Optional imports of the canonical\n+``auto_client_acquisition`` modules are wrapped so the script still runs (and\n+degrades gracefully) when those modules are unavailable.\n+\"\"\"\n+\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+import argparse\n+import json\n+import sys\n+from datetime import date\n+from pathlib import Path\n+from typing import Any, Callable\n+\n+ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]\n+if str(ROOT) not in sys.path:\n+    sys.path.insert(0, str(ROOT))\n+\n+# Reuse the local workspace creator (self-contained, no third-party imports).\n+try:  # pragma: no cover - import guard\n+    from scripts.create_customer_workspace import create_workspace\n+except Exception:  # pragma: no cover - fallback path\n+    create_workspace = None  # type: ignore[assignment]\n+\n+PASS = \"PASS\"\n+BLOCKER = \"BLOCKER\"\n+\n+# The 5-rung offer ladder (mirrors docs/OFFER_LADDER.md, results-first framing).\n+OFFER_LADDER: list[str] = [\n+    \"free_tools\",\n+    \"low_risk_entry\",\n+    \"core_subscription\",\n+    \"high_value_execution\",\n+    \"performance_layer\",\n+]\n+\n+\n+def _result(stage: str, status: str, detail: str, **extra: Any) -> dict[str, Any]:\n+    out: dict[str, Any] = {\"stage\": stage, \"status\": status, \"detail\": detail}\n+    out.update(extra)\n+    return out\n+\n+\n+def stage_target() -> dict[str, Any]:\n+    \"\"\"Pick a simulated warm target. Never sources from scraping.\"\"\"\n+    target = {\n+        \"company\": \"Dry Run Trading Co\",\n+        \"channel\": \"warm_intro\",\n+        \"source\": \"founder_known_contact\",\n+        \"mode\": \"dry_run\",\n+    }\n+    if target[\"channel\"] in {\"cold_whatsapp\", \"linkedin_automation\", \"scraping\"}:\n+        return _result(\"target\", BLOCKER, \"forbidden channel selected\", target=target)\n+    return _result(\"target\", PASS, \"warm target selected\", target=target)\n+\n+\n+def stage_outreach_approval() -> dict[str, Any]:\n+    \"\"\"Outreach must require explicit approval; it must never auto-send.\"\"\"\n+    requires_approval = True\n+    auto_sent = False\n+    governance_status = \"draft\"\n+    if auto_sent or not requires_approval:\n+        return _result(\n+            \"outreach_approval\",\n+            BLOCKER,\n+            \"outreach auto-sent or did not require approval\",\n+        )",

configs[\"quality\"]\n+    reasons: list[str] = []\n+    score = 100\n+    text = f\"{draft['subject']} {draft['body']} {draft['cta']}\".lower()\n+    channel = draft[\"channel\"]\n+    sensitive = _vertical_by_id(configs, draft[\"vertical\"]).get(\"sensitive\", False)\n+\n+    # must mention vertical or pain\n+    pain = draft[\"pain_angle\"].lower()\n+    if pain not in draft[\"body\"].lower():\n+        score -= 40\n+        reasons.append(\"missing_pain_or_vertical\")\n+    # single CTA (exactly one question across body+cta)\n+    qn = _question_count(draft[\"body\"]) + _question_count(draft[\"cta\"])\n+    if qn != 1:\n+        score -= 25\n+        reasons.append(\"not_single_cta\")\n+    # opt-out where required\n+    ch_cfg = configs[\"channels\"][\"channels\"][channel]\n+    if ch_cfg.get(\"requires_opt_out\") and not draft[\"opt_out\"].strip():\n+        score -= 25\n+        reasons.append(\"missing_opt_out\")\n+    # human approval language for sensitive verticals\n+    if sensitive:\n+        markers = (\"إشراف\", \"أنتم من يقرر\", \"control\", \"you decide\", \"approval\")\n+        if not any(m.lower() in text for m in markers):\n+            score -= 20\n+            reasons.append(\"sensitive_missing_human_approval\")\n+    # length limit\n+    limit = rules[\"max_words_by_channel\"].get(channel, 180)\n+    if _word_count(draft[\"body\"], draft[\"cta\"]) > limit:\n+        score -= 20\n+        reasons.append(\"overlength\")\n+    # generic agency language\n+    for phrase in rules[\"generic_agency_phrases\"]:\n+        if phrase.lower() in text:\n+            score -= 30\n+            reasons.append(\"generic_agency_language\")\n+            break\n+    # single offer\n+    offer_hits = sum(\n+        1 for o in configs[\"offers\"][\"ladder\"]\n+        if o[\"name_en\"].split(\" — \")[0].lower() in text or o[\"name_ar\"].split(\" — \")[0] in draft[\"body\"]\n+    )\n+    if offer_hits > 1:\n+        score -= 20\n+        reasons.append(\"multiple_offer\")\n+\n+    return max(0, min(100, score)), reasons\n+\n+\n+def score_compliance(draft: dict, configs: dict) -> tuple[int, list[str]]:\n+    cfg = configs[\"compliance\"]\n+    reasons: list[str] = []\n+    score = 100\n+    text = f\"{draft['subject']} {draft['body']} {draft['cta']}\".lower()\n+    channel = draft[\"channel\"]\n+\n+    for phrase in cfg[\"banned_phrases\"]:\n+        if phrase.lower() in text:\n+            score -= 50\n+            reasons.append(\"banned_phrase\")\n+    ch_cfg = configs[\"channels\"][\"channels\"][channel]\n+    if ch_cfg.get(\"requires_opt_out\") and not draft[\"opt_out\"].strip():\n+        score -= 40\n+        reasons.append(\"no_opt_out\")\n+    # sensitive vertical needs privacy-first language\n+    if draft[\"vertical\"] in cfg[\"sensitive_verticals\"]:\n+        markers = cfg[\"privacy_first_markers_en\"] + cfg[\"privacy_first_markers_ar\"]\n+        if not any(m.lower() in text or m in draft[\"body\"] for m in markers):\n+            score -= 30\n+            reasons.append(\"sensitive_no_privacy_language\")\n+    # multiple CTA\n+    qn = _question_count(draft[\"body\"]) + _question_count(draft[\"cta\"])\n+    if qn > 1:\n+        score -= 25\n+        reasons.append(\"multiple_cta\")\n+    # whatsapp needs opt-in (only if a whatsapp draft is ever produced)\n+    if channel == \"whatsapp\" and draft.get(\"research_required\"):\n+        score -= 30\n+        reasons.append(\"whatsapp_no_optin\")\n+\n+    return max(0, min(100, score)), reasons\n+\n+\n+def quality_gate(draft: dict, configs: dict) -> tuple[bool, int, list[str]]:\n+    score, reasons = score_quality(draft, configs)\n+    passed = score >= configs[\"quality\"][\"min_quality_score\"] and not reasons\n+    return passed, score, reasons\n+\n+\n+def compliance_gate(draft: dict, configs: dict) -> tuple[bool, int, list[str]]:\n+    score, reasons = score_compliance(draft, configs)\n+    passed = score >= configs[\"compliance\"][\"min_compliance_score\"] and not reasons\n+    return passed, score, reasons\n+\n+\n+def finalize_draft(draft: dict, configs: dict) -> dict:\n+    \"\"\"Score, gate, set status / risk / notes, and lock safety flags.\"\"\"\n+    q_pass, q_score, q_reasons = quality_gate(draft, configs)\n+    c_pass, c_score, c_reasons = compliance_gate(draft, configs)\n+    draft[\"quality_score\"] = q_score\n+    draft[\"compliance_score\"] = c_score\n+\n+    sensitive = _vertical_by_id(configs, draft[\"vertical\"]).get(\"sensitive\", False)\n+\n+    if not c_pass:\n+        draft[\"status\"] = \"rejected_compliance\"\n+        draft[\"rejection_reason\"] = \";\".join(c_reasons) or \"compliance_below_threshold\"\n+        draft[\"risk_level\"] = \"high\"\n+    elif not q_pass:\n+        draft[\"status\"] = \"rejected_quality\"\n+        draft[\"rejection_reason\"] = \";\".join(q_reasons) or \"quality_below_threshold\"\n+        draft[\"risk_level\"] = \"high\"\n+    elif draft[\"research_required\"]:\n+        draft[\"status\"] = \"needs_research\"\n+        draft[\"rejection_reason\"] = \"\"\n+        draft[\"risk_level\"] = \"medium\"\n+    elif draft.get(\"_consent\") == \"opt_in\" and q_score >= 90 and c_score >= 90:\n+        draft[\"status\"] = \"ready_for_manual_copy\"\n+        draft[\"rejection_reason\"] = \"\"\n+        draft[\"risk_level\"] = \"medium\" if sensitive else \"low\"\n+    else:\n+        draft[\"status\"] = \"founder_review\"\n+        draft[\"rejection_reason\"] = \"\"\n+        draft[\"risk_level\"] = \"medium\" if sensitive else \"low\"\n+\n+    # Founder notes\n+    notes = []\n+    if draft[\"research_required\"]:\n+        notes.append(\"Verify company + public contact before any manual send.\")\n+    if sensitive:\n+        notes.append(\"Sensitive sector: keep privacy-first, human-in-the-loop language.\")\n+    if draft[\"status\"].startswith(\"rejected\"):\n+        notes.append(\"Rejected by gate — do not send; fix or archive.\")\n+    if draft[\"status\"] == \"ready_for_manual_copy\":\n+        notes.append(\"Founder approval still required before any manual copy/send.\")\n+    draft[\"founder_notes\"] = \" \".join(notes) or \"Founder The dry run and template are validated\n+# against this exact list.\n+COMMAND_SPRINT_FILES = (\n+    \"00_intake.md\",\n+    \"01_company_intelligence.md\",\n+    \"02_diagnostic_summary.md\",\n+    \"03_command_sprint_scope.md\",\n+    \"04_revenue_map.md\",\n+    \"05_proof_register.md\",\n+    \"06_approval_register.md\",\n+    \"07_next_action_board.md\",\n+    \"08_executive_command_brief.md\",\n+    \"09_delivery_log.md\",\n+    \"10_proof_pack.md\",\n+    \"11_upsell_recommendation.md\",\n+)\n+\n+\n+def slugify(name: str) -> str:\n+    slug = name.strip().lower()\n+    slug = re.sub(r\"[^a-z0-9]+\", \"-\", slug)\n+    return slug.strip(\"-\") or \"customer\"\n+\n+\n+def create_workspace(name: str, force: bool = False) -> tuple[Path, list[str]]:\n+    \"\"\"Create the workspace; return (path, list of file names written).\"\"\"\n+    if not TEMPLATE_DIR.is_dir():\n+        raise FileNotFoundError(f\"Template directory missing: {TEMPLATE_DIR}\")\n+\n+    slug = slugify(name)\n+    target = CUSTOMERS_DIR / slug\n+\n+    if target.exists() and not force:\n+        print(\"CUSTOMER_WORKSPACE_EXISTS\")\n+        raise FileExistsError(\n+            f\"Customer folder already exists: {target} (use --force to overwrite)\"\n+        )\n+\n+    target.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n+    written: list[str] = []\n+    for fname in COMMAND_SPRINT_FILES:\n+        src = TEMPLATE_DIR / fname\n+        if not src.is_file():\n+            raise FileNotFoundError(f\"Template file missing: {src}\")\n+        content = src.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\").replace(\"<<COMPANY_NAME>>\", name)\n+        (target / fname).write_text(content, encoding=\"utf-8\")\n+        written.append(fname)\n+    return target, written\n+\n+\n+def main(argv: list[str] | None = None) -> int:\n+    try:\n+        sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding=\"utf-8\")\n+    except (AttributeError, OSError):",

Proves the system *flows*, stage by stage, and writes a PASS/FAIL\n+report to ``reports/verification/e2e_dry_run_latest.md``.\n+\n+Stages:\n+    1. Target\n+    2. Outreach Approval (founder approval required — never auto-sent)\n+    3. Diagnostic\n+    4. Offer\n+    5. Paid Sprint Simulation (SIMULATED status only — no real payment)\n+    6. Customer Workspace\n+    7. Proof Pack (skeleton — no fake result presented as real)\n+    8. Upsell\n+    9. Founder Daily Command\n+    + Governance gate (No External Action Without Approval)\n+\n+Hard rules enforced:\n+    - no real external sending\n+    - no fake proof presented as real\n+    - no guaranteed revenue\n+    - no customer name publishing\n+    - no WhatsApp automation\n+    - all external actions remain approval-required\n+\n+Usage:\n+    python scripts/run_dealix_e2e_dry_run.py\n+\n+Terminal markers:\n+    E2E_DRY_RUN_VERDICT=<verdict>\n+    DEALIX_E2E_DRY_RUN_OK=true|false\n+\"\"\"\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+import csv\n+import sys\n+from dataclasses import dataclass, field\n+from datetime import date\n+from pathlib import Path\n+\n+REPO = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]\n+if str(REPO) not in sys.path:\n+    sys.path.insert(0, str(REPO))\n+\n+from scripts.create_customer_workspace import (  # noqa: E402\n+    COMMAND_SPRINT_FILES,\n+    create_workspace,\n+)\n+\n+DRY_RUN_CLIENT = \"dry-run-client\"\n+\n+\n+@dataclass\n+class Stage:\n+    key: str\n+    name: str\n+    core: bool\n+    passed: bool = False\n+    notes: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)\n+\n+    def fail(self, msg: str) -> None:\n+        self.passed = False\n+        self.notes.append(msg)\n+\n+    def ok(self, msg: str) -> None:\n+        self.passed = True\n+        self.notes.append(msg)\n+\n+\n+def _read(rel: str) -> str:\n+    fp = REPO / rel\n+    return fp.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\", errors=\"ignore\") if fp.is_file() else \"\"\n+\n+\n+def stage_target() -> Stage:\n+    s = Stage(\"target\", \"Target\", core=True)\n+    fp = REPO / \"data/outreach/first_30_targets.csv\"\n+    if not fp.is_file():\n+        s.fail(\"data/outreach/first_30_targets.csv missing\")\n+        return s\n+    rows = list(csv.DictReader(fp.open(encoding=\"utf-8\", newline=\"\")))\n+    if not rows:\n+        s.fail(\"targets file has no rows\")\n+        return s\n+    s.ok(f\"target list present ({len(rows)} seed rows); simulated target = '{DRY_RUN_CLIENT}'\")\n+    return s\n+\n+\n+def stage_outreach_approval() -> Stage:\n+    s = Stage(\"outreach\", \"Outreach Approval\", core=True)\n+    fp = REPO / \"data/outreach/approval_queue.csv\"\n+    if not fp.is_file():\n+        s.fail(\"data/outreach/approval_queue.csv missing\")\n+        return s\n+    rows = list(csv.DictReader(fp.open(encoding=\"utf-8\", newline=\"\")))\n+    # Approval gate is real only if nothing is auto-approved/sent.\n+    sent = [r for r in rows if (r.get(\"founder_decision\") or \"\").strip().lower() in {\"sent\", \"auto\", \"auto-approved\", \"approved-auto\"}]\n+    if sent:\n+        s.fail(f\"{len(sent)} row(s) marked auto-sent/auto-approved — violates approval gate\")\n+        return s\n+    pending = [r for r in rows if (r.get(\"founder_decision\") or \"\").strip().lower() == \"pending\"]\n+    s.ok(f\"approval queue present; {len(pending)} draft(s) pending founder approval; none auto-sent\")\n+    return s\n+\n+\n+def stage_diagnostic(ws: Path) -> Stage:\n+    s = Stage(\"diagnostic\", \"Diagnostic\", core=True)\n+    f = ws / \"02_diagnostic_summary.md\"\n+    script = REPO / \"scripts/dealix_diagnostic.py\"\n+    if not f.is_file():\n+        s.fail(\"02_diagnostic_summary.md missing from workspace\")\n+        return s\n+    if not script.is_file():\n+        s.fail(\"scripts/dealix_diagnostic.py missing\")\n+        return s\n+    s.ok(\"diagnostic record present in workspace; diagnostic script available\")\n+    return s\n+\n+\n+def stage_offer(ws: Path) -> Stage:\n+    s = Stage(\"offer\", \"Offer\", core=True)\n+    scope = ws / \"03_command_sprint_scope.md\"\n+    offer_doc = REPO / \"docs/commercial/sales/P1_REVENUE_INTELLIGENCE_SPRINT_OFFER_AR.md\"\n+    if not scope.is_file():\n+        s.fail(\"03_command_sprint_scope.md missing from workspace\")\n+        return s\n+    if not offer_doc.is_file():\n+        s.fail(\"Command Sprint offer doc missing\")\n+        return s\n+    s.ok(\"Command Sprint scope present in workspace; offer doc available\")\n+    return s\n+\n+\n+def stage_paid_sim() -> Stage:\n+    s = Stage(\"paid\", \"Paid Sprint Simulation\", core=False)\n+    # In-memory simulated payment — explicitly NOT a real charge.\n+    simulated_status = \"SIMULATED-PAID (no real payment link, no charge)\"\n+    s.ok(f\"payment status simulated only: {simulated_status}\")\n+    return s\n+\n+\n+def stage_workspace(ws: Path) -> Stage:\n+    s = Stage(\"workspace\", \"Customer Workspace\", core=True)\n+    missing = [f for f in COMMAND_SPRINT_FILES if not (ws / f).is_file()]\n+    if missing:\n+        s.fail(f\"missing workspace files: {', '.join(missing)}\")\n+        return s\n+    s.ok(f\"all {len(COMMAND_SPRINT_FILES)} Command Sprint files present in customers/{DRY_RUN_CLIENT}/\")\n+    return s\n+\n+\n+def stage_proof_pack(ws: Path) -> Stage:\n+    s = Stage(\"proof\", \"Proof Pack\", core=True)\n+    f = ws / \"10_proof_pack.md\"\n+    if not f.is_file():\n+        s.fail(\"10_proof_pack.md missing\")\n+        return s\n+    text = f.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\", errors=\"ignore\")\n+    # Guard: a skeleton must NOT present any verified/achieved result.\n+    if \"✅\" in text and \"Verified\" in text:\n+        s.fail(\"proof pack appears to present a verified result in a dry run (fake proof risk)\")\n+        return s\n+    if \"Skeleton\" not in text and \"skeleton\" not in text:\n+        s.notes.append(\"note: proof pack does not self-identify as a skeleton\")\n+    s.ok(\"proof pack skeleton present; no fabricated/verified result asserted\")\n+    return s\n+\n+\n+def stage_upsell(ws: Path) -> Stage:\n+    s = Stage(\"upsell\", \"Upsell\", core=False)\n+    f = ws / \"11_upsell_recommendation.md\"\n+    if not f.is_file():\n+        s.fail(\"11_upsell_recommendation.md missing\")\n+        return s\n+    s.ok(\"upsell recommendation present (A2 — founder review before offering)\")\n+    return s\n+\n+\n+def stage_daily_command() -> Stage:\n+    s = Stage(\"daily\", \"Founder Daily Command\", core=False)\n+    out = REPO / \"reports/founder/daily_command.md\"\n+    out.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n+    out.write_text(render_daily_command(), encoding=\"utf-8\")\n+    s.ok(f\"founder daily command written: {out.relative_to(REPO)}\")\n+    return s\n+\n+\n+def stage_governance() -> Stage:\n+    s = Stage(\"governance\", \"Governance\", core=True)\n+    gate = REPO / \"docs/03_governance/NO_EXTERNAL_ACTION_WITHOUT_APPROVAL.md\"\n+    policy = REPO / \"docs/governance/APPROVAL_POLICY.md\"\n+    if not gate.is_file():\n+        s.fail(\"NO_EXTERNAL_ACTION_WITHOUT_APPROVAL.md missing\")\n+        return s\n+    if not policy.is_file():\n+        s.fail(\"docs/governance/APPROVAL_POLICY.md missing\")\n+        return s\n+    # The dry run itself performs zero external actions — assert that invariant.\n+    s.ok(\"No-External-Action gate present; dry run performed 0 external actions\")\n+    return s\n+\n+\n+def render_daily_command() -> str:\n+    today = date.today().isoformat()\n+    return f\"\"\"# Founder Daily Command — {today}\n+\n+_Refreshed by `scripts/run_dealix_e2e_dry_run.py`. The one screen to run the day._\n+\n+## 1. Today's single most important move\n+- [ ] _(decide one)_\n+\n+## 2. Awaiting your approval (A2/A3 — nothing sends without you)\n+- See `data/outreach/approval_queue.csv` — drafts pending founder approval.\n+\n+## 3. Pipeline at a glance\n+| Stage | Count | Next action |\n+| --- | --- | --- |\n+| Targets (seed) | see `data/outreach/first_30_targets.csv` | shortlist top 10 |\n+| Drafts pending approval | see approval queue | review + approve |\n+| Diagnostics booked | 0 | book first |\n+| Offers sent | 0 | — |\n+| Paid sprints | 0 | — |\n+| Proof packs delivered | 0 | — |\n+\n+## 4. Guardrails (always on)\n+- No auto-send. No cold WhatsApp. No guaranteed-revenue claims.\n+- No customer name published without written consent.\n+- Every external action is logged in the customer Approval Register.\n+\n+## 5. Next 5 founder actions\n+1. Review `reports/launch/private_launch_readiness.md`.\n+2. Confirm E2E dry run verdict in `reports/verification/e2e_dry_run_latest.md`.\n+3. Shortlist top 10 from the first-30 targets.\n+4. Approve up to 5 outreach drafts (manual send only).\n+5. .\docs\03_governance\NO_EXTERNAL_ACTION_WITHOUT_APPROVAL.md:32:4. **A4** requires explicit founder approval **and** attached evidence
.\docs\03_governance\NO_EXTERNAL_ACTION_WITHOUT_APPROVAL.md:38:**higher** level and stop for approval.
.\docs\03_governance\NO_EXTERNAL_ACTION_WITHOUT_APPROVAL.md:46:| **Email** | A3 | Drafting = A2; sending = A3. No auto-send. |
.\docs\03_governance\NO_EXTERNAL_ACTION_WITHOUT_APPROVAL.md:47:| **WhatsApp** | A3 | No cold automation, ever. Manual send only, after approval. |
.\docs\03_governance\NO_EXTERNAL_ACTION_WITHOUT_APPROVAL.md:51:| **Payment links** | A4 | Money path → approval + evidence. |
.\docs\03_governance\NO_EXTERNAL_ACTION_WITHOUT_APPROVAL.md:70:  approval policy exist and that no auto-send language is present.

.\reports\github-context\pr-614\review_comments.json:7:    "diff_hunk": "@@ -0,0 +1,161 @@\n+#!/usr/bin/env python3\n+\"\"\"Shared helpers for Dealix V9 Strategic Moat & Enterprise Readiness OS verifiers.\n+\n+All V9 verify scripts are static, read-only checks. They:\n+  * confirm required operating files exist and have substantive content,\n+  * scan for forbidden / unverified claims (the non-negotiables),\n+  * write a machine-readable JSON report under outputs/v9_verification/,\n+  * print a single-line VERDICT and return an exit code.\n+\n+No secrets, no network, no external sending. Founder-approval-first by design.\n+\"\"\"\n+\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+import json\n+import re\n+from datetime import date\n+from pathlib import Path\n+from typing import Iterable\n+\n+REPO = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]\n+OUTPUT_DIR = REPO / \"outputs\" / \"v9_verification\"\n+\n+# Minimum byte size for a doc to count as \"substantive\" content.\n+MIN_DOC_BYTES = 400\n+\n+# Forbidden / unverified-claim patterns. Kept deliberately specific so the\n+# non-negotiables can be referenced (e.g. \"we do NOT guarantee ROI\") without\n+# tripping the scanner — only affirmative bad claims match.\n+FORBIDDEN_PATTERNS: tuple[tuple[str, str], ...] = (\n+    (r\"guaranteed\\s+roi\", \"guaranteed ROI claim\"),\n+    (r\"\\bwe\\s+guarantee\\s+(?:a\\s+)?(?:\\d+\\s*%|return|revenue|results?)\\b\", \"guaranteed results claim\"),\n+    (r\"\\b(?:soc\\s?2|iso\\s?27001|pci[-\\s]?dss)\\s+certified\\b\", \"unverified certification claim\"),\n+    (r\"\\b100%\\s+secure\\b\", \"absolute security claim\"),\n+    (r\"\\bfully\\s+automated\\s+(?:outreach|sending|outbound)\\b\", \"blind automation claim\"),\n+    (r\"\\bauto[-\\s]?send(?:s|ing)?\\s+(?:to\\s+)?(?:customers?|clients?|leads?)\\b\", \"auto-send claim\"),\n+    (r\"\\bscrap(?:e|es|ing)\\s+(?:linkedin|leads?|contacts?|emails?)\\b\", \"scraping claim\"),\n+)\n+\n+ALLOW_NEGATION_WINDOW = 60  # chars before a match scanned for negation context.\n+NEGATION_HINTS = (\"no \", \"not \", \"never\", \"without\", \"ممنوع\", \"لا \", \"بدون\", \"do not\", \"don't\", \"doesn't\")\n+\n+\n+def scan_forbidden(text: str) -> list[str]:\n+    \"\"\"Return list of forbidden-claim descriptions found as affirmative claims.\"\"\"\n+    violations: list[str] = []\n+    lowered = text.lower()\n+    for pattern, label in FORBIDDEN_PATTERNS:\n+        for m in re.finditer(pattern, lowered):\n+            window = lowered[max(0, m.start() - ALLOW_NEGATION_WINDOW): m.start()]\n+            if any(hint in window for hint in NEGATION_HINTS):\n+                continue  # negated / policy statement — allowed\n+            violations.append(f\"{label}: '...{lowered[max(0, m.start()-20):m.end()+20].strip()}...'\")\n+    return violations\n+\n+\n+def check_file(rel_path: str) -> dict:\n+    \"\"\"Check a single required file: existence, size, forbidden claims.\"\"\"\n+    path = REPO / rel_path\n+    entry: dict = {\"path\": rel_path, \"exists\": path.is_file()}\n+    if not entry[\"exists\"]:\n+        entry.update(bytes=0, substantive=False, violations=[])\n+        return entry\n+    raw = path.read_bytes()\n+    text = raw.decode(\"utf-8\", errors=\"replace\")\n+    entry[\"bytes\"] = len(raw)\n+    entry[\"substantive\"] = len(raw) >= MIN_DOC_BYTES\n+    entry[\"violations\"] = scan_forbidden(text)\n+    return entry\n+\n+\n+def check_json(rel_path: str, required_keys: Iterable[str] = ()) -> dict:\n+    \"\"\"Check a config JSON: existence, parseability, required top-level keys.\"\"\"\n+    path = REPO / rel_path\n+    entry: dict = {\"path\": rel_path, \"exists\": path.is_file()}\n+    if not entry[\"exists\"]:\n+        entry.update(valid_json=False, missing_keys=list(required_keys))\n+        return entry\n+    try:\n+        data = json.loads(path.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\"))\n+        entry[\"valid_json\"] = True\n+        entry[\"missing_keys\"] = [k for k in required_keys if k not in data]\n+        entry[\"violations\"] = scan_forbidden(json.dumps(data, ensure_ascii=False))\n+    except (json.JSONDecodeError, UnicodeDecodeError) as exc:  # pragma: no cover\n+        entry[\"valid_json\"] = False\n+        entry[\"missing_keys\"] = list(required_keys)\n+        entry[\"error\"] = str(exc)\n+    return entry\n+\n+\n+def run_system_check(\n+    system: str,\n+    required_files: Iterable[str],\n+    required_configs: Iterable[tuple[str, tuple[str, ...]]] = (),\n+    output_name: str | None = None,\n+) -> dict:\n+    \"\"\"Run the standard V9 check for a system and persist a JSON report.\n+\n+    Returns the report dict with a top-level ``verdict`` of PASS/FAIL.\n+    \"\"\"\n+    file_results = [check_file(p) for p in required_files]\n+    config_results = [check_json(p, keys) for p, keys in required_configs]\n+\n+    missing = [r[\"path\"] for r in file_results if not r[\"exists\"]]\n+    thin = [r[\"path\"] for r in file_results if r[\"exists\"] and not r[\"substantive\"]]\n+    bad_json = [r[\"path\"] for r in config_results if not r.get(\"valid_json\")]\n+    missing_keys = [\n+        {\"path\": r[\"path\"], \"missing\": r[\"missing_keys\"]}\n+        for r in config_results\n+        if r.get(\"missing_keys\")\n+    ]\n+    violations = [\n+        {\"path\": r[\"path\"], \"violations\": r[\"violations\"]}\n+        for r in (file_results + config_results)\n+        if r.get(\"violations\")\n+    ]\n+\n+    passed = not (missing or thin or bad_json or missing_keys or violations)\n+    report = {\n+        \"system\": system,\n+        \"date\": date.today().isoformat(),\n+        \"verdict\": \"PASS\" if passed else \"FAIL\",",

They:\n+  * confirm required operating files exist and have substantive content,\n+  * scan for forbidden / unverified claims (the non-negotiables),\n+  * write a machine-readable JSON report under outputs/v9_verification/,\n+  * print a single-line VERDICT and return an exit code.\n+\n+No secrets, no network, no external sending. Founder-approval-first by design.\n+\"\"\"\n+\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+import json\n+import re\n+from datetime import date\n+from pathlib import Path\n+from typing import Iterable\n+\n+REPO = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]\n+OUTPUT_DIR = REPO / \"outputs\" / \"v9_verification\"\n+\n+# Minimum byte size for a doc to count as \"substantive\" content.\n+MIN_DOC_BYTES = 400\n+\n+# Forbidden / unverified-claim patterns. Kept deliberately specific so the\n+# non-negotiables can be referenced (e.g. \"we do NOT guarantee ROI\") without\n+# tripping the scanner — only affirmative bad claims match.\n+FORBIDDEN_PATTERNS: tuple[tuple[str, str], ...] = (\n+    (r\"guaranteed\\s+roi\", \"guaranteed ROI claim\"),\n+    (r\"\\bwe\\s+guarantee\\s+(?:a\\s+)?(?:\\d+\\s*%|return|revenue|results?)\\b\", \"guaranteed results claim\"),\n+    (r\"\\b(?:soc\\s?2|iso\\s?27001|pci[-\\s]?dss)\\s+certified\\b\", \"unverified certification claim\"),\n+    (r\"\\b100%\\s+secure\\b\", \"absolute security claim\"),\n+    (r\"\\bfully\\s+automated\\s+(?:outreach|sending|outbound)\\b\", \"blind automation claim\"),\n+    (r\"\\bauto[-\\s]?send(?:s|ing)?\\s+(?:to\\s+)?(?:customers?|clients?|leads?)\\b\", \"auto-send claim\"),\n+    (r\"\\bscrap(?:e|es|ing)\\s+(?:linkedin|leads?|contacts?|emails?)\\b\", \"scraping claim\"),\n+)\n+\n+ALLOW_NEGATION_WINDOW = 60  # chars before a match scanned for negation context.\n+NEGATION_HINTS = (\"no \", \"not \", \"never\", \"without\", \"ممنوع\", \"لا \", \"بدون\", \"do not\", \"don't\", \"doesn't\")\n+\n+\n+def scan_forbidden(text: str) -> list[str]:\n+    \"\"\"Return list of forbidden-claim descriptions found as affirmative claims.\"\"\"\n+    violations: list[str] = []\n+    lowered = text.lower()\n+    for pattern, label in FORBIDDEN_PATTERNS:\n+        for m in re.finditer(pattern, lowered):\n+            window = lowered[max(0, m.start() - ALLOW_NEGATION_WINDOW): m.start()]\n+            if any(hint in window for hint in NEGATION_HINTS):\n+                continue  # negated / policy statement — allowed\n+            violations.append(f\"{label}: '...{lowered[max(0, m.start()-20):m.end()+20].strip()}...'\")\n+    return violations\n+\n+\n+def check_file(rel_path: str) -> dict:\n+    \"\"\"Check a single required file: existence, size, forbidden claims.\"\"\"\n+    path = REPO / rel_path\n+    entry: dict = {\"path\": rel_path, \"exists\": path.is_file()}\n+    if not entry[\"exists\"]:\n+        entry.update(bytes=0, substantive=False, violations=[])\n+        return entry\n+    raw = path.read_bytes()\n+    text = raw.decode(\"utf-8\", errors=\"replace\")\n+    entry[\"bytes\"] = len(raw)\n+    entry[\"substantive\"] = len(raw) >= MIN_DOC_BYTES\n+    entry[\"violations\"] = scan_forbidden(text)\n+    return entry\n+\n+\n+def check_json(rel_path: str, required_keys: Iterable[str] = ()) -> dict:\n+    \"\"\"Check a config JSON: existence, parseability, required top-level keys.\"\"\"\n+    path = REPO / rel_path\n+    entry: dict = {\"path\": rel_path, \"exists\": path.is_file()}\n+    if not entry[\"exists\"]:\n+        entry.update(valid_json=False, missing_keys=list(required_keys))\n+        return entry\n+    try:\n+        data = json.loads(path.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\"))\n+        entry[\"valid_json\"] = True\n+        entry[\"missing_keys\"] = [k for k in required_keys if k not in data]\n+        entry[\"violations\"] = scan_forbidden(json.dumps(data, ensure_ascii=False))\n+    except (json.JSONDecodeError, UnicodeDecodeError) as exc:  # pragma: no cover\n+        entry[\"valid_json\"] = False\n+        entry[\"missing_keys\"] = list(required_keys)\n+        entry[\"error\"] = str(exc)\n+    return entry\n+\n+\n+def run_system_check(\n+    system: str,\n+ They:\n+  * confirm required operating files exist and have substantive content,\n+  * scan for forbidden / unverified claims (the non-negotiables),\n+  * write a machine-readable JSON report under outputs/v9_verification/,\n+  * print a single-line VERDICT and return an exit code.\n+\n+No secrets, no network, no external sending. Founder-approval-first by design.\n+\"\"\"\n+\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+import json\n+import re\n+from datetime import date\n+from pathlib import Path\n+from typing import Iterable\n+\n+REPO = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]\n+OUTPUT_DIR = REPO / \"outputs\" / \"v9_verification\"\n+\n+# Minimum byte size for a doc to count as \"substantive\" content.\n+MIN_DOC_BYTES = 400\n+\n+# Forbidden / unverified-claim patterns. Kept deliberately specific so the\n+# non-negotiables can be referenced (e.g. \"we do NOT guarantee ROI\") without\n+# tripping the scanner — only affirmative bad claims match.\n+FORBIDDEN_PATTERNS: tuple[tuple[str, str], ...] = (\n+    (r\"guaranteed\\s+roi\", \"guaranteed ROI claim\"),\n+    (r\"\\bwe\\s+guarantee\\s+(?:a\\s+)?(?:\\d+\\s*%|return|revenue|results?)\\b\", \"guaranteed results claim\"),\n+    (r\"\\b(?:soc\\s?2|iso\\s?27001|pci[-\\s]?dss)\\s+certified\\b\", \"unverified certification claim\"),\n+    (r\"\\b100%\\s+secure\\b\", \"absolute security claim\"),\n+    (r\"\\bfully\\s+automated\\s+(?:outreach|sending|outbound)\\b\", \"blind automation claim\"),\n+    (r\"\\bauto[-\\s]?send(?:s|ing)?\\s+(?:to\\s+)?(?:customers?|clients?|leads?)\\b\", \"auto-send claim\"),\n+    (r\"\\bscrap(?:e|es|ing)\\s+(?:linkedin|leads?|contacts?|emails?)\\b\", \"scraping claim\"),\n+)\n+\n+ALLOW_NEGATION_WINDOW = 60  # chars before a match scanned for negation context.\n+NEGATION_HINTS = (\"no \", \"not \", \"never\", \"without\", \"ممنوع\", \"لا \", \"بدون\", \"do not\", \"don't\", \"doesn't\")\n+\n+\n+def scan_forbidden(text: str) -> list[str]:\n+    \"\"\"Return list of forbidden-claim descriptions found as affirmative claims.\"\"\"\n+    violations: list[str] = []\n+    lowered = text.lower()\n+    for pattern, label in FORBIDDEN_PATTERNS:\n+        for m in re.finditer(pattern, lowered):\n+            window = lowered[max(0, m.start() - ALLOW_NEGATION_WINDOW): m.start()]\n+            if any(hint in window for hint in NEGATION_HINTS):\n+                continue  # negated / policy statement — allowed\n+            violations.append(f\"{label}: '...{lowered[max(0, m.start()-20):m.end()+20].strip()}...'\")\n+    return violations\n+\n+\n+def check_file(rel_path: str) -> dict:\n+    \"\"\"Check a single required file: existence, size, forbidden claims.\"\"\"\n+    path = REPO / rel_path\n+    entry: dict = {\"path\": rel_path, \"exists\": path.is_file()}\n+    if not entry[\"exists\"]:\n+        entry.update(bytes=0, substantive=False, violations=[])\n+        return entry\n+    raw = path.read_bytes()\n+    text = raw.decode(\"utf-8\", errors=\"replace\")\n+    entry[\"bytes\"] = len(raw)\n+    entry[\"substantive\"] = len(raw) >= MIN_DOC_BYTES\n+    entry[\"violations\"] = scan_forbidden(text)\n+    return entry\n+\n+\n+def check_json(rel_path: str, required_keys: Iterable[str] = ()) -> dict:\n+    \"\"\"Check a config JSON: existence, parseability, required top-level keys.\"\"\"\n+    path = REPO / rel_path\n+    entry: dict = {\"path\": rel_path, \"exists\": path.is_file()}\n+    if not entry[\"exists\"]:\n+        entry.update(valid_json=False, missing_keys=list(required_keys))\n+        return entry\n+    try:\n+        data = json.loads(path.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\"))\n+        entry[\"valid_json\"] = True\n+        entry[\"missing_keys\"] = [k for k in required_keys if k not in data]\n+        entry[\"violations\"] = scan_forbidden(json.dumps(data, ensure_ascii=False))\n+    except (json.JSONDecodeError, UnicodeDecodeError) as exc:  # pragma: no cover\n+        entry[\"valid_json\"] = False\n+        entry[\"missing_keys\"] = list(required_keys)\n+        entry[\"error\"] = str(exc)\n+    return entry\n+\n+\n+def run_system_check(\n+    system: str,\n+    required_files: Iterable[str],\n+    required_configs: Iterable[tuple[str, tuple[str, ...]]] = (),\n+    output_name: str | None = None,\n+) -> dict:\n+    \"\"\"Run the standard V9 check for a system and persist a JSON report.\n+\n+    Returns the report dict with a top-level ``verdict`` of PASS/FAIL.\n+    \"\"\"\n+    file_results = [check_file(p) for p in required_files]\n+    config_results = [check_json(p, keys) for p, keys in required_configs]\n+\n+    missing = [r[\"path\"] for r in file_results if not r[\"exists\"]]\n+    thin = [r[\"path\"] for r in file_results if r[\"exists\"] and not r[\"substantive\"]]\n+    bad_json = [r[\"path\"] for r in config_results if not r.get(\"valid_json\")]\n+    missing_keys = [\n+        {\"path\": r[\"path\"], \"missing\": r[\"missing_keys\"]}\n+        for r in config_results\n+        if r.get(\"missing_keys\")\n+    ]\n+    violations = [\n+        {\"path\": r[\"path\"], \"violations\": r[\"violations\"]}\n+        for r in (file_results + config_results)\n+        if r.get(\"violations\")\n+    ]\n+\n+    passed = not (missing or thin or bad_json or missing_keys or violations)\n+    report = {\n+        \"system\": system,\n+        \"date\": date.today().isoformat(),\n+        \"verdict\": \"PASS\" if passed else \"FAIL\",\n+        \"summary\": {\n+            \"files_required\": len(file_results),\n+            \"files_present\": sum(1 for r in file_results if r[\"exists\"]),\n+            \"configs_required\": len(config_results),\n+            \"missing\": missing,\n+            \"thin\": thin,\n+            \"bad_json\": bad_json,\n+            \"missing_keys\": missing_keys,\n+            \"violations\": violations,\n+        },\n+        \"files\": file_results,\n+        \"configs\": config_results,\n+    }\n+\n+    OUTPUT_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n+    name = output_name or system.lower().replace(\" \", \"_\")\n+    (OUTPUT_DIR / f\"{name}.json\").write_text(\n+        json.dumps(report, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding=\"utf-8\"\n+    )\n+    return report\n+\n+\n+def print_and_exit(report: dict) -> int:\n+    \"\"\"Print a human verdict line and return an exit code (0 PASS / 1 FAIL).\"\"\"\n+    s = report[\"summary\"]\n+    print(f\"[{report['system']}] verdict={report['verdict']} \"\n+          f\"files={s['files_present']}/{s['files_required']}\")\n+    if s[\"missing\"]:\n+        print(f\"  missing: {s['missing']}\")\n+    if s[\"thin\"]:\n+        print(f\"  thin: {s['thin']}\")\n+    if The founder reviews,\n+approves, sends manually, sells, signs, and decides. The system never sends\n+externally.**\n+\n+الذكاء الاصطناعي يجهّز ويحلّل ويصيغ ويرتّب ويوصي. المؤسس يراجع ويعتمد ويرسل يدويًا\n+ويبيع ويوقّع ويقرّر. النظام لا يرسل خارجيًا أبدًا.\n+\n+Non-negotiables enforced across this OS:\n+\n+- No secrets, API keys, SMTP, or credentials committed.\n+- No email / WhatsApp / LinkedIn outbound, no platform automation.\n+- No scraping, no auto-submit, no live paid-ads launch.\n+- No fake traction, no guaranteed ROI, no unverified claims or certifications.\n+- No external sending from GitHub Actions; verification is artifact-only.\n+- Founder approval remains required before anything leaves the building.\n+\"\"\"\n+\n+\n+def render(title_en: str, title_ar: str, purpose_en: str, purpose_ar: str,\n+           sections: list[tuple[str, list[str]]]) -> str:\n+    \"\"\"Render one operating doc as bilingual markdown.\"\"\"\n+    lines: list[str] = []\n+    lines.append(f\"# {title_en} / {title_ar}\")\n+    lines.append(\"\")\n+    lines.append(f\"> **Purpose (EN):** {purpose_en}\")\n+    lines.append(\">\")\n+    lines.append(f\"> **الغرض (AR):** {purpose_ar}\")\n+    lines.append(\"\")\n+    lines.append(f\"_Layer: V9 — Strategic Moat & Enterprise Readiness OS · \"\n+                 f\"Generated: {date.today().isoformat()}_\")\n+    lines.append(\"\")\n+    for heading, bullets in sections:\n+        lines.append(f\"## {heading}\")\n+        lines.append(\"\")\n+        for b in bullets:\n+            lines.append(f\"- {b}\")\n+        lines.append(\"\")\n+    lines.append(SAFETY_FOOTER.strip())\n+    lines.append(\"\")\n+    return \"\\n\".join(lines)\n+\n+\n+def report_sections(system: str, added: list[str], why: list[str],\n+                    risks: list[str], next_actions: list[str]) -> list[tuple[str, list[str]]]:\n+    \"\"\"Standard 99_*_REPORT section set.\"\"\"\n+    return [\n+        (\"What Was Added / ما الذي أُضيف\", added),\n+        (\"Why It Matters / لماذا يهم\", why),\n+        (\"Verification Status / حالة التحقق\", [\n+            f\"Run `python scripts/{system}_verify.py` for the machine-readable result.\",\n+            \"JSON report is written to `outputs/v9_verification/`.\",\n+            \"Verdict is PASS when all required files exist, are substantive, and carry no forbidden claims.\",\n+        ]),\n+        (\"Risks / المخاطر\", risks),\n+        (\"Blockers / المعوقات\", [\n+            \"Legal and security templates remain pending external review before customer use.\",\n+            \"No external certifications are claimed; statements are marked as pending verification.\",\n+        ]),\n+        (\"Next Actions / الخطوات التالية\", next_actions),\n+        (\"GO / NO-GO\", [\n+            \"GO: internal preparation, drafting, ranking, and founder-reviewed packets.\",\n+            \"NO-GO: external sending, platform automation, fake traction, unreviewed legal/security claims.\",\n+        ]),\n+    ]\n+\n+\n+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n+# System definitions. Each entry: folder -> list of (filename, doc-spec)\n+# doc-spec = (title_en, title_ar, purpose_en, purpose_ar, sections)\n+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n+\n+def S(h: str, *bullets: str) -> tuple[str, list[str]]:\n+    return (h, list(bullets))\n+\n+\n+SYSTEMS: dict[str, list[tuple[str, tuple]]] = {}\n+\n+\n+# 1. التنافسية\",\n+        \"How Dealix builds advantages that are hard to copy and compound over time.\",\n+        \"كيف يبني Dealix ميزات يصعب نسخها وتتراكم مع الوقت.\",\n+        [\n+            S(\"Overview / نظرة عامة\",\n+              \"Five reinforcing moats: data, workflow IP, trust, distribution, delivery.\",\n+              \"Each daily output is captured as reusable knowledge, not    S(\"Thesis / الأطروحة\",\n+              \"Advantage = accumulated workflows × verified proof × trusted relationships.\",\n+              \"Competitors can copy a feature but not the accumulated operating memory.\",\n+              \"Approval-first delivery is a trust advantage in regulated Saudi sectors.\"),\n+            S(\"What Compounds / ما الذي يتراكم\",\n+              \"Sector-specific playbooks, objection libraries, and proof packs.\",\n+              \"Founder relationships and reference customers.\"),\n+        ],\n+    )),\n+    (\"02_COMPOUNDING_ADVANTAGES.md\", (\n+        \"Compounding Advantages\", \"الميزات المتراكمة\",\n+        \"The loops that turn daily work into durable advantage.\",\n+        \"الحلقات التي تحوّل Silence between days erodes trust faster than any single defect; the daily note is the cheapest insurance against silent failure.

It generates daily opportunities, classifies them, writes high-quality bilingual drafts, runs them through quality + compliance + safety gates, and places them in a **Founder Review Queue**.\n\n> ⚠️ **The system never sends or posts anything externally.** No SMTP, no API send, no social auto-posting, no scheduling, no ad spend, no LinkedIn/WhatsApp automation, no scraping, no secrets. The founder reviews and publishes every message manually.\n\n## First 5 verticals\n1. Facilities Management & Maintenance — إدارة المرافق والصيانة\n2. Contracting & Project Controls — المقاولات وضبط المشاريع\n3. Real Estate & Property Operations — العقار وإدارة الأملاك\n4. Legal & Professional Services — المكاتب القانونية والخدمات المهنية\n5. Consulting, Training & B2B Services — الاستشارات والتدريب وخدمات B2B\n\nEach ships a full playbook (ICP, personas, titles, pain map, offer angle, entry/pilot/retainer offers, proof asset, AR+EN messaging, objections, qualification/disqualification, compliance notes, delivery promise, success metrics, sample drafts).\n\n## Draft factory output (outreach)\n```\npython scripts/commercial_generate_400_drafts.py --target 400\n→ accepted=478  rejected=0  target=400  safety_passed=True\n```\n175 cold email + 100 follow-up + 75 LinkedIn manual + 50 website form = **400 minimum** (478 produced), bilingual, avg quality/compliance 100/100.\n\n## Social & Media OS (review-only)\n```\npython scripts/commercial_social_factory.py\n→ accepted=136  rejected=0  min=80  safety_passed=True\n```\n8 platforms — LinkedIn, X, Instagram, newsletter, blog outline, **Google/Meta ad copy (no spend)**, PR pitch — across 6 content pillars, bilingual. Nothing here sends email, WhatsApp,\n+LinkedIn, or submits a form. No scraping, no secrets. Companies/contacts are\n+synthetic placeholders unless a local seed file is provided by the founder.\n+\n+    AI prepares. Founder approves. Manual action only. No external sending.\n+\"\"\"\n+\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+import argparse\n+import hashlib\n+\n+from _v7_revenue_common import (\n+    OUTPUTS,\n+    SAFETY_BANNER,\n+    SEED_CHANNELS,\n+    SEED_VERTICALS,\n+    slugify,\n+    today,\n+    write_json,\n+    write_jsonl,\n+    write_text,\n+)\n+\n+LANGUAGES = (\"ar\", \"en\")\n+RISK_LEVELS = (\"low\", \"medium\", \"high\")\n+\n+\n+def _score(seed: str) -> int:\n+    \"\"\"Deterministic 40-99 priority score from a stable hash (no randomness).\"\"\"\n+    h = int(hashlib.sha256(seed.encode(\"utf-8\")).hexdigest(), 16)\n+    return 40 + (h % 60)\n+\n+\n+def _draft(idx: int) -> dict:\n+    vertical = SEED_VERTICALS[idx % len(SEED_VERTICALS)]\n+    channel = SEED_CHANNELS[idx % len(SEED_CHANNELS)]\n+    language = LANGUAGES[idx % len(LANGUAGES)]\n+    company = f\"Prospect {idx:04d} ({vertical})\"\n+    draft_id = f\"DRAFT-{today()}-{idx:04d}\"\n+    score = _score(draft_id)\n+    risk = RISK_LEVELS[score % len(RISK_LEVELS)]\n+    if language == \"ar\":\n+        copy = (\n+            f\"مرحباً، لاحظنا أن شركات {vertical} تواجه احتكاكاً في عملياتها اليومية. \"\n+            \"أعددنا تشخيصاً مختصراً قد يكشف فرص توفير. هل تسمح بمكالمة 15 دقيقة؟ \"\n+            \"(مسودة للمراجعة فقط — لن تُرسل تلقائياً)\"\n+        )\n+    else:\n+        copy = (\n+            f\"Hi, we noticed {vertical} teams hit recurring operational friction. \"\n+            \"We prepared a short diagnostic that may surface savings. Open to a \"\n+            \"15-minute call? (Review-only draft — not auto-sent.)\"\n+        )\n+    return {\n+        \"draft_id\": draft_id,\n+        \"company\": company,\n+        \"vertical\": vertical,\n+        \"channel\": channel,\n+        \"language\": language,\n+        \"priority_score\": score,\n+        \"risk_level\": risk,\n+        \"stage\": \"draft_generated\",\n+        \"manual_copy_text\": copy,\n+        \"review_only\": True,\n+        \"send_blocked\": True,\n+    }\n+\n+\n+def generate(target: int, date: str | None = None) -> dict:\n+    date = today(date)\n+    out_dir = OUTPUTS / \"commercial_launch\" / date\n+    drafts = [_draft(i) for i in range(1, target + 1)]\n+\n+    write_jsonl(out_dir / \"draft_queue.jsonl\", drafts)\n+\n+    top = sorted(drafts, key=lambda d: d[\"priority_score\"], reverse=True)[:50]\n+    lines = [\n+        \"# Top 50 Priority Drafts — Review Only\",\n+        \"\",\n+        f\"> {SAFETY_BANNER}\",\n+        \"\",\n+        f\"Generated: {date} · Total drafts: {len(drafts)}\",\n+        \"\",\n+        \"| # | draft_id | company | vertical | channel | lang | score | risk |\",\n+        \"| - | -------- | ------- | -------- | ------- | ---- | ----- | ---- |\",\n+    ]\n+    for i, d in enumerate(top, start=1):\n+        lines.append(\n+            f\"| {i} | {d['draft_id']} | {d['company']} | {d['vertical']} | \"\n+            f\"{d['channel']} | {d['language']} | {d['priority_score']} | {d['risk_level']} |\"\n+        )\n+    lines += [\n+        \"\",\n+        \"## Founder note\",\n+        \"\",\n+        \"These are preparation drafts. Pick the strongest, copy the text \"\n+        \"**manually**, and send it yourself through your own account. \"\n+        \"Nothing here is auto-sent.\",",

.\reports\github-context\pr-609\review_comments.json:76:    "diff_hunk": "@@ -0,0 +1,505 @@\n+#!/usr/bin/env python3\n+\"\"\"Dealix 400+ Daily Draft Factory.\n+\n+Generates at least 400 review-only outreach drafts per day across four manual\n+channels (cold email, follow-up, LinkedIn manual, website/contact form), scores\n+and gates them, and writes the founder review queue plus reports.\n+\n+GOVERNING RULE (enforced on every draft):\n+    AI drafts, ranks, and recommends.\n+    Founder reviews, approves, and sends manually.\n+    The system never sends externally.\n+\n+Every draft carries the mandatory safety flags:\n+    send_allowed = False\n+    external_send_blocked = True\n+    requires_founder_approval = True\n+    no_auto_send = True\n+\n+This script NEVER sends anything. It only writes local artifacts.\n+\"\"\"\n+\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+import argparse\n+import hashlib\n+import random\n+import sys\n+from datetime import UTC, datetime, timezone\n+from pathlib import Path\n+from typing import Any\n+\n+sys.path.insert(0, str(Path(__file__).resolve().parent))\n+from _commercial_common import (\n+    COMMERCIAL_OUTPUTS,\n+    DATA_DIR,\n+    GOVERNING_RULE,\n+    MANDATORY_SAFETY_FLAGS,\n+    load_config,\n+    read_jsonl,\n+    today_str,\n+    write_csv,\n+    write_json,\n+    write_jsonl,\n+    write_text,\n+)\n+from commercial_compliance_gate import evaluate_compliance\n+from commercial_quality_gate import evaluate_quality\n+from commercial_score_drafts import score_draft\n+\n+OPT_OUT_EN = \"If this isn't relevant, reply 'unsubscribe' and you won't hear from me again.\"\n+OPT_OUT_AR = \"إن لم يكن هذا مناسبًا، الرجاء الرد بكلمة (إلغاء) ولن نعاود التواصل.\"\n+\n+\n+def _cta_for_stage(offer: dict[str, Any], lang: str) -> str:\n+    stage = offer.get(\"stage\")\n+    table = {\n+        \"audit\": (\"Request an AI Workflow Audit\", \"اطلب تدقيق سير العمل بالذكاء الاصطناعي\"),\n+        \"pilot\": (\"Start a Paid Pilot\", \"ابدأ تجربة مدفوعة\"),\n+        \"department_os\": (\"Book a Diagnostic\", \"احجز جلسة تشخيص\"),\n+        \"retainer\": (\"Book a Diagnostic\", \"احجز جلسة تشخيص\"),\n+        \"enterprise\": (\"Book a Diagnostic\", \"احجز جلسة تشخيص\"),\n+    }\n+    en, ar = table.get(stage, (\"Book a Diagnostic\", \"احجز جلسة تشخيص\"))\n+    return ar if lang == \"ar\" else en\n+\n+\n+def _price_label(offer: dict[str, Any]) -> str:\n+    lo, hi = offer.get(\"price_min\"), offer.get(\"price_max\")\n+    if hi is None:\n+        return f\"{lo:,}+ SAR\"\n+    return f\"{lo:,}–{hi:,} SAR\"\n+\n+\n+def _build_email(lead, vert, offer, pain, lang, channel) -> tuple[str, str]:\n+    company = lead[\"company_name\"]\n+    city = lead[\"city\"]\n+    cta = _cta_for_stage(offer, lang)\n+    price = _price_label(offer)\n+    is_follow = channel == \"follow_up\"\n+    if lang == \"ar\":\n+        vname = vert[\"name_ar\"]\n+        pang = pain[\"ar\"]\n+        oname = offer[\"name_ar\"]\n+        opener = (\n+            f\"أتابع رسالتي السابقة إلى {company} في {city}.\"\n+            if is_follow\n+            else f\"أتواصل مع {company} في {city}.\"\n+        )\n+        subject = f\"متابعة: {pang} في {company}\" if is_follow else f\"{pang} في {company}؟\"\n+        body = (\n+            f\"مرحبًا فريق {company}،\\n\\n\"\n+            f\"{opener} فرق {vname} غالبًا ما تفقد وقتًا في {pang}. \"\n+            f\"ديليكس هو نظام تشغيل للإيرادات والعمليات بالذكاء الاصطناعي يصيغ العمل ويرتّبه حسب الأولوية، \"\n+            f\"بينما يراجع فريقكم ويعتمد كل خطوة — ولا يُرسل شيء دون قرار بشري.\\n\\n\"\n+            f\"هل يفيدكم {oname} ({price}) لرسم فرصتين أو ثلاث فرص سريعة في عملياتكم؟ \"\n+            f\"نحترم خصوصية بياناتكم ولا نعالجها قبل اتفاق واضح.\\n\\n\"\n+            f\"{cta}\\n\\n\"\n+            f\"{OPT_OUT_AR}\\n— فريق ديليكس\"\n+        )\n+    else:\n+        vname = vert[\"name_en\"]\n+        pang = pain[\"en\"]\n+        oname = offer[\"name_en\"]\n+        opener = (\n+            f\"Following up on my earlier note to {company} in {city}.\"\n+            if is_follow\n+            else f\"I'm reaching out to {company} in {city}.\"\n+        )\n+        subject = f\"Re: {pang} at {company}\" if is_follow else f\"{pang} at {company}?\"\n+        body = (\n+            f\"Hi {company} team,\\n\\n\"\n+            f\"{opener} {vname} teams here often lose hours on {pang}. \"\n+            f\"Dealix is an AI revenue & operations OS that drafts and ranks the work while your team \"\n+            f\"reviews and approves every step — nothing goes out without a human.\\n\\n\"\n+            f\"Would a short {oname} ({price}) help us map two or three quick wins for your operations? \"\n+            f\"We keep your data private and never process it before a clear agreement.\\n\\n\"\n+            f\"{cta}\\n\\n\"\n+            f\"{OPT_OUT_EN}\\n— The Dealix team\"\n+        )\n+    return subject, body\n+\n+\n+def _build_linkedin(lead, vert, offer, pain, lang) -> tuple[str, str]:\n+    company = lead[\"company_name\"]\n+    cta = _cta_for_stage(offer, lang)\n+    if lang == \"ar\":\n+        pang = pain[\"ar\"]\n+        subject = f\"رسالة لينكدإن — {company}\"\n+        body = (\n+            f\"مرحبًا، لاحظت عمل {company} في {lead['city']}. \"\n+            f\"كثير من فرق {vert['name_ar']} تتعامل مع {pang}. \"\n+            f\"في ديليكس نصيغ ونرتّب العمل بالذكاء الاصطناعي، ويبقى الاعتماد والإرسال بيد فريقكم دائمًا. \"\n+            f\"{cta}؟ (هذه مسودة يدوية للمراجعة — لا أتمتة على لينكدإن.)\"\n+        )\n+    else:\n+        pang = pain[\"en\"]\n+        subject = f\"LinkedIn note — {company}\"\n+        body = (\n+            f\"Hi — saw the work {company} is doing in {lead['city']}. \"\n+            f\"Many {vert['name_en']} teams wrestle with {pang}. \"\n+            f\"Dealix drafts and ranks the work with AI while your team keeps approval and sending. \"\n+            f\"Open to a quick chat? {cta}. (Manual draft for review — no LinkedIn automation.)\"\n+        )\n+    return subject, body\n+\n+\n+def _build_contact_form(lead, vert, offer, pain, lang) -> tuple[str, str]:\n+    company = lead[\"company_name\"]\n+    cta = _cta_for_stage(offer, lang)\n+    if lang == \"ar\":\n+        pang = pain[\"ar\"]\n+        subject = f\"نقاط نموذج التواصل — {company}\"\n+        body = (\n+            f\"ملاحظات يدوية للمؤسس قبل ملء نموذج التواصل الخاص بـ {company}:\\n\"\n+            f\"- القطاع: {vert['name_ar']} في {lead['city']}.\\n\"\n+            f\"- الزاوية: {pang}.\\n\"\n+            f\"- العرض المقترح: {offer['name_ar']} ({_price_label(offer)}).\\n\"\n+            f\"- الدعوة: {cta}.\\n\"\n+            f\"ملاحظة: لا إرسال تلقائي للنماذج — يقوم المؤسس بالتعبئة يدويًا.\"\n+        )\n+    else:\n+        pang = pain[\"en\"]\n+        subject = f\"Contact-form talking points — {company}\"\n+        body = (\n+            f\"Manual talking points for the founder before filling {company}'s contact form:\\n\"\n+            f\"- Vertical: {vert['name_en']} in {lead['city']}.\\n\"\n+            f\"- Angle: {pang}.\\n\"\n+            f\"- Suggested offer: {offer['name_en']} ({_price_label(offer)}).\\n\"\n+            f\"- CTA: {cta}.\\n\"\n+            f\"Note: no form auto-submit — the founder fills this manually.\"\n+        )\n+    return subject, body\n+\n+\n+def _make_draft(\n+    seq, batch_id, created_at, lead, vert, offer, pain, lang, channel\n+) -> dict[str, Any]:\n+    if channel in (\"cold_email\", \"follow_up\"):\n+        subject, body = _build_email(lead, vert, offer, pain, lang, channel)\n+        opt_out = OPT_OUT_AR if lang == \"ar\" else OPT_OUT_EN\n+    elif channel == \"linkedin_manual\":\n+        subject, body = _build_linkedin(lead, vert, offer, pain, lang)\n+        opt_out = \"\"\n+    else:\n+        subject, body = _build_contact_form(lead, vert, offer, pain, lang)\n+        opt_out = \"\"\n+\n+    # Privacy-sensitive verticals (e.g. legal) must always carry privacy-first language.\n+    if vert.get(\"privacy_sensitive\"):\n+        if lang == \"ar\":\n+            body += \"\\n\\nنلتزم بحماية الخصوصية ولا نعالج أي بيانات شخصية قبل موافقتك واتفاق مكتوب.\"\n+        else:\n+            body += \"\\n\\nWe are privacy-first: we don't process any personal data before your consent and a written agreement.\"\n+\n+    raw_id = f\"{batch_id}:{channel}:{seq}:{lead['lead_id']}:{offer['id']}:{lang}\"\n+    draft_id = \"drf_\" + hashlib.sha1(raw_id.encode()).hexdigest()[:16]  # noqa: S324 - non-crypto id\n+    cta = _cta_for_stage(offer, lang)\n+\n+    opt_in = lead.get(\"opt_in_status\", \"unknown\")\n+    research_required = opt_in == \"unknown\"\n+\n+    draft: dict[str, Any] = {\n+        \"draft_id\": draft_id,\n+        \"batch_id\": batch_id,\n+        \"created_at\": created_at,\n+        \"company_name\": lead[\"company_name\"],\n+        \"source_lead_id\": lead[\"lead_id\"],\n+        \"vertical\": vert[\"id\"],\n+        \"country\": lead[\"country\"],\n+        \"city\": lead[\"city\"],\n+        \"channel\": channel,\n+        \"language\": lang,\n+        \"buyer_persona\": lead.get(\"buyer_persona\", \"\"),\n+        \"buyer_title\": lead.get(\"buyer_title\", \"\"),\n+        \"offer_stage\": offer[\"stage\"],\n+        \"offer_name\": offer[\"name_en\"],\n+        \"pain_angle\": pain[\"en\"],\n+        \"trigger_event\": random.choice(\n+            vert.get(\"triggers\", [\"general outreach\"])\n+        ),  # noqa: S311 - non-crypto sample selection\n+        \"subject\": subject,\n+        \"body\": body,\n+        \"cta\": cta,\n+        \"opt_out\": opt_out,\n+        \"opt_in_status\": opt_in,\n+        \"quality_score\": 0,\n+        \"compliance_score\": 0,\n+        \"fit_score\": 0,\n+        \"priority_score\": 0.0,\n+        \"risk_level\": \"low\",\n+        \"research_required\": research_required,\n+        \"founder_notes\": \"\",\n+        \"rejection_reason\": \"\",\n+        \"status\": \"ready_for_founder_review\",\n+        **MANDATORY_SAFETY_FLAGS,\n+    }\n+    return draft\n+\n+\n+def generate(target: int, day: str, seed_path: Path) -> dict[str, Any]:\n+    rng = random.Random(f\"dealix-{day}\")  # noqa: S311 - deterministic, non-crypto draft variety\n+    random.seed(f\"dealix-trigger-{day}\")\n+\n+    verticals = load_config(\"commercial_verticals.json\")[\"verticals\"]\n+    vert_by_id = {v[\"id\"]: v for v in verticals}\n+    offers = load_config(\"commercial_offers.json\")[\"offers\"]\n+    offer_by_id = {o[\"id\"]: o for o in offers}\n+    distribution = load_config(\"commercial_draft_distribution.json\")[\"distribution\"]\n+    quality_cfg = load_config(\"commercial_quality_gates.json\")\n+    compliance_cfg = load_config(\"commercial_compliance_gates.json\")\n+    risk_cfg = load_config(\"commercial_risk_terms.json\")\n+    weights = load_config(\"commercial_founder_review_rules.json\").get(\"priority_weights\", {})\n+\n+    leads = read_jsonl(seed_path)\n+    if not leads:\n+        raise SystemExit(f\"No seed leads found at {seed_path}\")\n+\n+    # Scale distribution up proportionally if a higher target is requested.\n+    base_total = sum(distribution.values()) or 1\n+    scale = max(1, -(-target // base_total))  # ceil division\n+    plan = {ch: count * scale for ch, count in distribution.items()}\n+\n+    created_at = datetime.now(UTC).isoformat()\n+    batch_id = f\"batch_{day}\"\n+    langs = [\"en\", \"ar\"]\n+\n+    drafts: list[dict[str, Any]] = []\n+    for channel, count in plan.items():\n+        for i in range(count):\n+            lead = leads[(i * 7 + len(drafts)) % len(leads)]\n+            vert = vert_by_id.get(lead[\"vertical\"], verticals[0])\n+            offer = offer_by_id.get(vert.get(\"recommended_offer\", \"ai_workflow_audit\"), offers[0])\n+            # Mix in a higher-tier offer occasionally for variety.\n+            if i % 5 == 4:\n+                offer = rng.choice(offers[:3])\n+            pain = rng.choice(vert[\"pain_angles\"])\n+            lang = langs[(i + len(drafts)) % 2]\n+            draft = _make_draft(i, batch_id, created_at, lead, vert, offer, pain, lang, channel)\n+            drafts.append(draft)\n+\n+    # Score + gate every draft.\n+    for d in drafts:\n+        q = evaluate_quality(d, quality_cfg)\n+        c = evaluate_compliance(d, compliance_cfg)\n+        d[\"quality_score\"] = q[\"score\"]\n+        d[\"compliance_score\"] = c[\"score\"]\n+        score_draft(d, risk_cfg, weights)\n+        reasons = q[\"reasons\"] + c[\"reasons\"]\n+        if not (q[\"passed\"] and c[\"passed\"]):\n+            d[\"status\"] = \"rejected\"\n+            d[\"rejection_reason\"] = \"; \".join(reasons) or \"failed_gate\"\n+\n+    return {\n+        \"drafts\": drafts,\n+        \"batch_id\": batch_id,\n+        \"day\": day,\n+        \"plan\": plan,\n+        \"leads_used\": len(leads),\n+    }\n+\n+\n+def _verify_safety(drafts: list[dict[str, Any]]) -> None:\n+    for d in drafts:\n+        assert d[\"send_allowed\"] is False, d[\"draft_id\"]\n+        assert d[\"external_send_blocked\"] is True, d[\"draft_id\"]\n+        assert d[\"requires_founder_approval\"] is True, d[\"draft_id\"]\n+        assert d[\"no_auto_send\"] is True, d[\"draft_id\"]\n+\n+\n+def write_outputs(result: dict[str, Any], out_dir: Path) -> dict[str, Any]:\n+    drafts = result[\"drafts\"]\n+    _verify_safety(drafts)\n+    review_rules = load_config(\"commercial_founder_review_rules.json\")\n+\n+    approved = [d for d in drafts if d[\"status\"] == \"ready_for_founder_review\"]\n+    rejected = [d for d in drafts if d[\"status\"] == \"rejected\"]\n+    needs_research = [d for d in drafts if d.get(\"research_required\")]\n+    ranked = sorted(approved, key=lambda d: d[\"priority_score\"], reverse=True)\n+\n+    write_jsonl(out_dir / \"draft_queue.jsonl\", drafts)\n+    write_jsonl(out_dir / \"rejected_drafts.jsonl\", rejected)\n+    write_jsonl(out_dir / \"needs_research.jsonl\", needs_research)\n+\n+    # Founder review CSV + MD\n+    cols = review_rules[\"review_columns\"]\n+    rows = [[d.get(c, \"\") for c in cols] for d in ranked]\n+    write_csv(out_dir / \"founder_review.csv\", cols, rows)\n+\n+    md = [\n+        f\"# Founder Review Queue — {result['day']}\",\n+        \"\",\n+        f\"> {GOVERNING_RULE}\",\n+        \"\",\n+        f\"- Total drafts: **{len(drafts)}**\",\n+        f\"- Ready for review: **{len(approved)}**\",\n+        f\"- Rejected by gates: **{len(rejected)}**\",\n+        f\"- Needs research: **{len(needs_research)}**\",\n+        \"\",\n+        \"All drafts are review-only. `send_allowed=false`, `no_auto_send=true`. \"\n+        \"The founder approves and sends manually; the system never sends.\",",

_make_draft(\n+    seq, batch_id, created_at, lead, vert, offer, pain, lang, channel\n+) -> dict[str, Any]:\n+    if channel in (\"cold_email\", \"follow_up\"):\n+        subject, body = الخصوصية ولا نعالج أي بيانات شخصية قبل موافقتك واتفاق مكتوب.\"\n+        else:\n+            body += \"\\n\\nWe are privacy-first: we don't process any personal data before your consent and a written agreement.\"\n+\n+    raw_id = f\"{batch_id}:{channel}:{seq}:{lead['lead_id']}:{offer['id']}:{lang}\"\n+    draft_id = \"drf_\" + hashlib.sha1(raw_id.encode()).hexdigest()[:16]  # noqa: S324 - non-crypto id\n+    cta = _cta_for_stage(offer, lang)\n+\n+    opt_in = lead.get(\"opt_in_status\", \"unknown\")\n+    research_required = opt_in == \"unknown\"\n+\n+    draft: dict[str, Any] = {\n+ draft\n+\n+\n+def generate(target: int, day: str, seed_path: Path) -> dict[str, Any]:\n+    rng = random.Random(f\"dealix-{day}\")  # noqa: S311 - deterministic, non-crypto draft variety\n+    random.seed(f\"dealix-trigger-{day}\")\n+\n+    verticals = load_config(\"commercial_verticals.json\")[\"verticals\"]\n+    vert_by_id = {v[\"id\"]: v for v in verticals}\n+    offers = weights = load_config(\"commercial_founder_review_rules.json\").get(\"priority_weights\", {})\n+\n+    leads = read_jsonl(seed_path)\n+    if not leads:\n+        raise SystemExit(f\"No seed leads found at {seed_path}\")\n+\n+    # Scale distribution up proportionally if a higher target is requested.\n+    base_total = sum(distribution.values()) or 1\n+    scale = max(1, -(-target // base_total))  # ceil division\n+    plan = {ch: count * scale for ch, count in distribution.items()}\n+\n+    created_at = datetime.now(UTC).isoformat()\n+    batch_id = f\"batch_{day}\"\n+    langs = \"day\": day,\n+        \"plan\": plan,\n+        \"leads_used\": len(leads),\n+    }\n+\n+\n+def _verify_safety(drafts: list[dict[str, Any]]) -> None:\n+    for d in drafts:\n+        assert _verify_safety(drafts)\n+    review_rules = load_config(\"commercial_founder_review_rules.json\")\n+\n+    approved = [d for d in drafts if d[\"status\"] == \"ready_for_founder_review\"]\n+ **{len(needs_research)}**\",\n+        \"\",\n+        \"All drafts are review-only. `send_allowed=false`, `no_auto_send=true`. \"\n+        \"The founder approves and sends manually; the system never \"|---|----------|---------|----------|---------|------|-------|---------|\",\n+    ]\n+    for idx, d in enumerate(ranked[:100], 1):\n+        subj = d[\"subject\"].replace(\"|\", \"/\")\n+        md.append(\n+            f\"| {idx} | {d['priority_score']} | {d['company_name']} | {d['vertical']} | \"\n+            f\"{d['channel']} | {d['language']} | {d['offer_name']} | {subj} |\"\n+        )\n+    write_text(out_dir / \"founder_review.md\", \"\\n\".join(md) + \"\\n\")\n+\n+    # Top 50 priority\n+    top_n = review_rules.get(\"top_priority_count\", 50)\n+    top = [\n+        \"# Top {} [\n+            f\"## {idx}. {d['company_name']} — {d['vertical']} ({d['channel']}, {d['language']})\",\n+            f\"- Priority: {d['priority_score']} | Fit: {d['fit_score']} | Quality: {d['quality_score']} | Compliance: {d['compliance_score']} | Risk: {d['risk_level']}\",\n+            f\"- Offer: {d['offer_name']} | Buyer: {d['buyer_title']}\",\n+            f\"- Subject: {d['subject']}\",\n+            \"\",\n+            \"```\",\n+            d[\"body\"],\n+            \"```\",\n+            \"\",\n+        ]\n+    write_text(out_dir / \"top_50_priority.md\",     \"rejections\": len(rejected),\n+        \"avg_compliance_score\": round(sum(d[\"compliance_score\"] for d in drafts) / len(drafts), 2),\n+        \"forbidden_phrase_hits\": sum(\n+            1 for d in rejected if \"forbidden_phrase\" in d.get(\"rejection_reason\", \"\")\n+        ),\n+    }\n+    write_json(out_dir / \"quality_report.json\", quality_report)\n+    write_json(out_dir / Queued for your approval.\n+  4. ``scorecard.md`` — today's founder scorecard template.\n+  5. ``OPERATOR_PACK.md`` — the single index that ties it all together.\n+\n+Honors the doctrine (enforced by tests):\n+  - No external send. Every artifact is a file you read, edit, and act on.\n+  - No scraping. Prospects come from the CSV you control (a clearly-labelled\n+    sample seed ships so the command runs out-of-the-box on a fresh clone).\n+  - No guaranteed outcomes / no invented metrics. Estimates are labelled.\n+  - Every recommended action carries a ``governance_decision`` and the\n+    bilingual disclaimer.\n+\n+Usage:\n+    python scripts/dealix_day0.py                      # uses the sample seed\n+    python scripts/dealix_day0.py --prospects data/prospects.csv\n+    python scripts/dealix_day0.py --warm-list data/warm_list.csv\n+    python scripts/dealix_day0.py --top 8 --date 2026-06-07\n+    python scripts/dealix_day0.py --json               # machine-readable summary\n+\n+Exit codes:\n+    0  operator pack generated\n+    1  no prospect rows found (seed missing or empty)\n+\"\"\"\n+\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+import argparse\n+import csv\n+import json\n+import sys\n+from dataclasses import asdict, dataclass, field\n+from datetime import UTC, datetime\n+from pathlib import Path\n+\n+REPO_ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent\n+sys.path.insert(0, str(REPO_ROOT))\n+\n+from auto_client_acquisition.sales_os.icp_score import ICPDimensions, icp_score  # noqa: E402\n+from auto_client_acquisition.sales_os.qualification import qualify  # noqa: E402\n+\n+DISCLAIMER = (\n+    \"Estimated value is not Verified value / القيمة التقديرية ليست قيمة مُتحقَّقة. \"\n+    \"Estimated outcomes are not guaranteed outcomes / النتائج التقديرية ليست نتائج مضمونة.\"\n+)\n+\n+# The 5-rung commercial ladder (priced, wired). Keep in sync with docs/pricing.\n+OFFER_LADDER = {\n+    \"revenue_intelligence_sprint\": (\n+        \"7-Day Revenue Intelligence Sprint\",\n+        \"Sprint إيرادات 7 أيام\",\n+        \"499 SAR\",\n+    ),\n+    \"data_to_revenue_diagnostic\": (\n+        \"Data-to-Revenue Pack\",\n+        \"حزمة البيانات إلى الإيراد\",\n+        \"1,500 SAR\",\n+    ),\n+    \"data_to_revenue_pack\": (\"Data-to-Revenue Pack\", \"حزمة البيانات إلى الإيراد\", \"1,500 SAR\"),\n+    \"capability_diagnostic\": (\"Free AI Ops Diagnostic\", \"تشخيص العمليات المجاني\", \"0 SAR\"),\n+    \"managed_revenue_ops\": (\"Managed Revenue Ops\", \"تشغيل الإيرادات المُدار\", \"2,999–4,999 SAR/mo\"),\n+    \"refer_out_governance_not_accepted\": (\n+        \"Refer out — governance not accepted\",\n+        \"إحالة — لم تُقبل الحوكمة\",\n+        \"—\",\n+    ),\n+    \"refer_out_not_enough_fit\": (\"Refer out — insufficient fit\", \"إحالة — ملاءمة غير كافية\", \"—\"),\n+    \"not_a_fit_decline_politely\": (\n+        \"Decline politely — doctrine risk\",\n+        \"اعتذار مهذّب — مخالفة دكترين\",\n+        \"—\",\n+    ),\n+}\n+\n+OWNER_TITLES = {\"CEO\", \"COO\", \"GM\", \"FOUNDER\", \"MD\", \"VP\", \"MANAGING PARTNER\", \"OWNER\", \"DIRECTOR\"}\n+\n+# Sector → b2b-service fit (0–100). Deterministic, conservative.\n+SECTOR_FIT = {\n+    \"b2b_services\": 92,\n+    \"consulting\": 90,\n+    \"agency\": 88,\n+    \"saas\": 88,\n+    \"it_services\": 86,\n+    \"financial_services\": 80,\n+    \"logistics\": 76,\n+    \"distribution\": 74,\n+    \"manufacturing\": 70,\n+    \"real_estate\": 68,\n+    \"healthcare\": 66,\n+    \"retail\": 64,\n+    \"education\": 62,\n+    \"events\": 58,\n+    \"agritech\": 60,\n+}\n+\n+INBOUND_SOURCES = {\"inbound_form\", \"inbound_whatsapp\", \"inbound_email\", \"demo_request\"}\n+WARM_SOURCES = {\"warm_intro\", \"partner_referral\", \"referral\"}\n+\n+\n+@dataclass(slots=True)\n+class Prospect:\n+    name: str\n+    sector: str\n+    city: str = \"\"\n+    country: str = \"SA\"\n+    domain: str = \"\"\n+    contact_name: str = \"\"\n+    contact_title: str = \"\"\n+    source: str = \"manual_research\"\n+    locale: str = \"ar-SA\"\n+    annual_turnover_sar: int = 0\n+    notes: str = \"\"\n+\n+    @classmethod\n+    def from_row(cls, row: dict[str, str]) -> Prospect:\n+        def s(key: str, default: str = \"\") -> str:\n+            return (row.get(key) or default).strip()\n+\n+        turnover_raw = s(\"annual_turnover_sar\", \"0\").replace(\",\", \"\")\n+        try:\n+            turnover = int(float(turnover_raw)) if turnover_raw else 0\n+        except ValueError:\n+            turnover = 0\n+        return cls(\n+            name=s(\"name\"),\n+            sector=s(\"sector\").lower(),\n+            city=s(\"city\"),\n+            country=s(\"country\", \"SA\"),\n+ locale=s(\"locale\", \"ar-SA\"),\n+            annual_turnover_sar=turnover,\n+            notes=s(\"notes\"),\n+        )\n+\n+\n+@dataclass(slots=True)\n+class ScoredProspect:\n+    prospect: Prospect\n+    icp: int\n+    dimensions: dict[str, int]\n+    decision: str\n+    qual_score: int\n+    recommended_offer: str\n+    reasons: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)\n+    doctrine_violations: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)\n+\n+    @property\n+    def is_owner(self) -> bool:\n+        return self.prospect.contact_title.upper() in OWNER_TITLES\n+\n+\n+# ── Deterministic scoring ───────────────────────────────────────────────────\n+\n+\n+def _budget_signal(turnover: int) -> int:\n+    if turnover <= 0:\n+        return 35\n+    if turnover < 500_000:\n+        return 35\n+    if turnover < 1_000_000:\n+        return 55\n+    if turnover < 3_000_000:\n+        return 75\n+    if turnover < 7_000_000:\n+        return 85\n+    return 90\n+\n+\n+def _decision_velocity(source: str, is_owner: bool) -> int:\n+    if source in INBOUND_SOURCES:\n+        base = 85\n+    elif source in WARM_SOURCES:\n+        base = 72\n+    else:\n+        base = 40\n+    if is_owner:\n+        base += 8\n+    return min(100, base)\n+\n+\n+def _governance_posture(country: str, notes: str) -> int:\n+    base = 62 if country.upper() == \"SA\" else 50\n+    hay = notes.lower()\n+    if any(\n+        k in hay\n+        for k in (\n+            \"pdpl\",\n+            \"zatca\",\n+            \"compliance\",\n+            \"governance\",\n+            \"audit\",\n+            \"data-sensitive\",\n+            \"data sensitive\",\n+        )\n+    ):\n+        base += 18\n+    return min(100, base)\n+\n+\n+def _data_maturity(p: Prospect) -> int:\n+    base = 40\n+    if p.domain:\n+        base += 18\n+    if p.annual_turnover_sar > 0:\n+        base += 18\n+    if p.sector in {\"saas\", \"it_services\", \"financial_services\"}:\n+        base += 12\n+    if any(\n+        k in p.notes.lower()\n+        for k in (\"existing data\", \"crm\", \"pipeline\", \"data-mature\", \"data mature\")\n+    ):\n+        base += 10\n+    return min(100, base)\n+\n+\n+def derive_dimensions(p: Prospect) -> ICPDimensions:\n+    is_owner = p.contact_title.upper() in OWNER_TITLES\n+    return ICPDimensions(\n+        b2b_service_fit=SECTOR_FIT.get(p.sector, 55),\n+        data_maturity=_data_maturity(p),\n+        governance_posture=_governance_posture(p.country, p.notes),\n+        budget_signal=_budget_signal(p.annual_turnover_sar),\n+        decision_velocity=_decision_velocity(p.source, is_owner),\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def score_prospect(p: Prospect) -> ScoredProspect:\n+    dims = derive_dimensions(p)\n+    icp = icp_score(dims)\n+    is_owner = p.contact_title.upper() in OWNER_TITLES\n+\n+    verdict = qualify(\n+        pain_clear=p.source in INBOUND_SOURCES\n+        or \"struggl\" in p.notes.lower()\n+        or \"wants\" in p.notes.lower(),\n+        owner_present=is_owner,\n+        data_available=dims.data_maturity >= 60,\n+        accepts_governance=True,  # pre-screen assumption; confirmed on the call\n+        has_budget=dims.budget_signal >= 55,\n+        wants_safe_methods=True,\n+        proof_path_visible=True,\n+        retainer_path_visible=dims.budget_signal >= 75,\n+        raw_request_text=p.notes,\n+        sector=p.sector,\n+        city=p.city,\n+    )\n+    return ScoredProspect(\n+        prospect=p,\n+ reasons=list(verdict.reasons),\n+        doctrine_violations=list(verdict.doctrine_violations),\n+    )\n+\n+\n+# ── Talking points ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n+\n+DECISION_BADGE = {\n+    \"accept\": \"✅ accept — reach out today\",\n+    \"diagnostic_only\": \"🔵 diagnostic-only — lead with the free diagnostic\",\n+    \"reframe\": \"🟡 reframe — book a short scope call\",\n+    \"reject\": \"🔴 reject — doctrine risk, decline politely\",\n+    \"refer_out\": \"⚪ refer-out — not enough fit\",\n+}\n+\n+\n+def _offer_label(key: str) -> str:\n+    en, ar, price = OFFER_LADDER.get(key, (key, key, \"—\"))\n+    return f\"{en} / {ar} · {price}\"\n+\n+\n+def talking_points(sp: ScoredProspect) -> tuple[list[str], list[str]]:\n+    p = sp.prospect\n+    offer_en, offer_ar, price = OFFER_LADDER.get(\n+        sp.recommended_offer, (sp.recommended_offer, sp.recommended_offer, \"—\")\n+    )\n+    ar = [\n+        f\"الافتتاح: «لاحظت أن {p.name} في قطاع {p.sector} — نساعد شركات مثلكم على ترتيب الفرص وتنظيف البيانات تحت حوكمة AI واضحة.»\",\n+        f\"الربط بالألم: استند إلى ملاحظتك ({p.notes or 'تحديات متابعة العملاء'}).\",\n+        f\"العرض المقترح: {offer_ar} ({price}) — ابدأ صغير، أثبت القيمة، بدون وعود.\",\n+        \"الحوكمة كميزة: لا scraping، لا رسائل باردة، موافقتك قبل أي إجراء خارجي + Proof Pack.\",\n+        \"الخطوة التالية: احجز 20 دقيقة، أو ابدأ بالتشخيص المجاني خلال 24 ساعة.\",\n+    ]\n+    en = [\n+        f\"Open: “I noticed {p.name} in {p.sector} — we help similar Saudi B2B teams rank opportunities and clean their data under explicit AI governance.”\",\n+        f\"Tie to pain: anchor on your note ({p.notes or 'lead follow-up gaps'}).\",\n+        f\"Recommend: {offer_en} ({price}) — start small, prove value, no promises.\",\n+        \"Governance as the edge: no scraping, no cold messaging, your approval before any external action + a Proof Pack.\",\n+        \"Next step: book 20 minutes, or start the free 24h diagnostic.\",\n+    ]\n+    if sp.decision in (\"reject\", \"refer_out\"):\n+        ar = [\"هذا المُرشّح غير ملائم الآن — اعتذر بلطف أو أحِله لشريك. لا تتابع.\"]\n+        en = [\"Not a fit right now — decline politely or refer to a partner. Do not pursue.\"]\n+    return ar, en\n+\n+\n+# ── Renderers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n+\n+\n+def _gov_block(decision_summary: str) -> str:\n+    return (\n+        \"> **governance_decision:** `internal_artifact` · no external action taken · \"\n+        f\"{decision_summary}\\n>\\n> _{DISCLAIMER}_\\n\"\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def render_prospects_md(scored: list[ScoredProspect], generated: str) -> str:\n+    lines = [\n+        \"# Prospect shortlist — قائمة العملاء المحتملين (مُقيّمة ومرتّبة)\\n\",\n+        f\"_Generated: {generated}_\\n\",\n+        \"\\n> **Source:** the prospect CSV you control. Queued for your approval.\n+  4. ``scorecard.md`` — today's founder scorecard template.\n+  5. ``OPERATOR_PACK.md`` — the single index that ties it all together.\n+\n+Honors the doctrine (enforced by tests):\n+  - No external send. Every artifact is a file you read, edit, and act on.\n+  - No scraping. Queued for your approval.\n+  4. ``scorecard.md`` — today's founder scorecard template.\n+  5. ``OPERATOR_PACK.md`` — the single index that ties it all together.\n+\n+Honors the doctrine (enforced by tests):\n+  - No external send. render_scorecard_md(generated: str, date_str: str, n_actionable: int) -> str:\n+    return (\n+        \"# Founder daily scorecard — السجل اليومي للمؤسس\\n\"\n+        f\"_Generated: sent:               ____ / 5\\n\"\n+        \"- Replies received:            ____\\n\"\n+        \"- Diagnostics booked:          ____\\n\"\n+        \"- Diagnostics held:            ____\\n\"\n+ )\n+\n+\n+def render_operator_pack_md(date_str: str, generated: str, counts: dict, files: list[str]) -> str:\n+    return (\n+        f\"# Dealix — Operator Pack · حزمة المُشغّل · {date_str}\\n\\n\"\n+        f\"_Generated: {generated}_\\n\\n\"\n+        \"**One command stood the day up.** Work this pack top-to-bottom. \"\n+        \"Nothing here was sent externally — every artifact is yours to review, \"\n+        \"edit, and act on. أمر واحد جهّز يومك — راجع، عدّل، ونفّذ.\\n\\n\"\n+        \"## Today at a glance\\n\"\n+        f\"- Prospects scored: drafts, then send them *yourself*.\\n\"\n+        \"4. **`scorecard.md`** — fill at 18:00 KSA; paste into your daily log.\\n\\n\"\n+        \"## Files\\n\" + \"\".join(f\"- `{f}`\\n\" for f in files) No scraping, no cold WhatsApp/LinkedIn automation (rungs 1–3).\\n\"\n+        \"- The 5-rung ladder: Free Diagnostic → 499 Sprint → 1,500 Data Pack → \"\n+        \"2,999–4,999/mo Managed Ops → 5K–25K the outreach draft pack.\n+\n+    Prefers a founder-maintained warm list; otherwise derives drafts from the\n+    actionable prospects so the pack is never empty on a fresh clone.\n+    \"\"\"\n+ It:\n+\n+  1. Loads companies from a seed CSV (+ optional allowlisted discovery).\n+  2. Normalizes names/domains and de-duplicates.\n+  3. Attaches the evidence already gathered per row (allowlisted sources only).\n+  4. Scores each company on a 100-point firmographic / targeting model.\n+  5.
