Emits a raw pool, a ranked short-list, a brief, a weakness map, and\n+     draft-only outreach for founder review.\n+\n+Hard rules (the 11 non-negotiables — enforced, not decorative):\n+  - No scraping behind login, no robots.txt bypass, no CAPTCHA bypass.\n+  - No LinkedIn automation, no cold/bulk WhatsApp, no mass email.\n+  - No autonomous external sends — drafts only, founder approves.\n+  - No claim without evidence; sensitive sectors penalized.\n+  - Only sources on the allowlist are accepted.\n+Doctrine is enforced via ``auto_client_acquisition.safe_send_gateway``.\n+\n+Usage (offline, seed-only — the default safe path):\n+    python scripts/research_targeting_os.py \\\n+        --seed data/targeting/company_seed_template.csv \\\n+        --out data/targeting/out \\\n+        --top 50\n+\n+Usage (allowlisted discovery — requires Google Programmable Search keys):\n+    export GOOGLE_SEARCH_API_KEY=\"...\"\n+    export GOOGLE_SEARCH_CX=\"...\"\n+    python scripts/research_targeting_os.py \\\n+        --discover \\\n+        --queries-file data/targeting/queries.txt \\\n+        --seed data/targeting/company_seed_template.csv \\\n+        --out data/targeting/out \\\n+        --top 50\n+\n+Outputs (written under --out):\n+    ranked_targets.csv\n+    ranked_targets.jsonl\n+    daily_targeting_brief.md\n+    drafts_for_review.md\n+    weakness_map.md\n+\"\"\"\n+\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+import argparse\n+import csv\n+import json\n+import os\n+import re\n+import sys\n+from collections import Counter\n+from collections.abc import Iterable\n+from dataclasses import asdict, dataclass, field\n+from datetime import UTC, date, datetime\n+from pathlib import Path\n+from typing import Any\n+\n+_ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]\n+if str(_ROOT) not in sys.path:\n+    sys.path.insert(0, str(_ROOT))\n+\n+# Doctrine + claim safety reuse the canonical governed modules. .\reports\github-context\pr-621\detail.json:9:  "body": "## Dealix Research & Targeting OS\n\nA repeatable, **governed** daily loop that turns seeds + allowlisted research into a scored, evidence-backed **target pool** — not an outbound blaster. **Quality over volume. No external send without founder approval.**\n\n> The \"400\" is a research/analysis pool, **not** 400 messages.\n\n### What it does\n1. Collect (seeds ± allowlisted discovery) → 2. Normalize (AR/EN names + domains) → 3. De-dupe (domain, then name; merge evidence) → 4. Attach evidence → 5. Score (100-pt model) → 6. Infer weakness → Dealix OS → 7. Recommend offer rung → 8. Emit raw pool / shortlist → 9. Build **review-only** drafts.\n\n### Scoring (100 pts)\nICP Fit 35 · Pain Signal 25 · Intent/Timing 20 · Access 10 · Evidence Confidence 10 · Risk Penalty −20 → grades A+/A/B/C/D.\n\n**Golden rule (enforced):** never target without **2 pain evidences OR a warm path** — otherwise the grade is capped at **B** and routed to a free Diagnostic.\n\n### Weakness → Dealix OS\nProof weakness→Proof OS · Follow-up leakage→Revenue OS · Delivery visibility→Delivery OS · Support recurrence→Support OS · Executive decision fog→Command OS · Data fragmentation→Data OS.\n\n### Governance / non-negotiables\n- Reuses the canonical doctrine guard `safe_send_gateway` + `governance_os.claim_safety`.\n- Allowed sources pinned in `data/targeting/source_allowlist.json`; **blocked sources hard-rejected and logged**.\n- No scraping behind login · no robots.txt/CAPTCHA bypass · no LinkedIn automation · no cold/bulk WhatsApp · no mass email · **no auto-send** · no claim without evidence.\n\n### Files\n| Path | Purpose |\n| --- | --- |\n| `scripts/research_targeting_os.py` | The engine (dependency-light, importable, CLI). |\n| `data/targeting/{company_seed_template.csv,queries.txt,source_allowlist.json}` | Inputs. |\n| `docs/go-to-market/RESEARCH_TARGETING_OS.md` | System spec (AR+EN). |\n| `docs/go-to-market/DAILY_400_TARGETING_PLAYBOOK.md` | Daily ritual (AR+EN). |\n| `docs/governance/PROSPECT_RESEARCH_COMPLIANCE_POLICY.md` | Binding policy (AR+EN). |\n| `.github/workflows/daily-targeting-os.yml` | 08:00 Riyadh; artifacts only; never sends. |\n| `tests/test_research_targeting_os.py` | 23 tests. |\n\n### Outputs (`data/targeting/out/`, gitignored)\n`ranked_targets.csv` · `ranked_targets.jsonl` · `daily_targeting_brief.md` · `drafts_for_review.md` · `weakness_map.md`\n\n### Run\n```bash\npython scripts/research_targeting_os.py \\\n  --seed data/targeting/company_seed_template.csv \\\n  --out data/targeting/out --top 50\n```\nOptional allowlisted discovery via `GOOGLE_SEARCH_API_KEY` + `GOOGLE_SEARCH_CX` (graceful seed-only fallback when keys absent — reads public result metadata only, no scraping).\n\n### Tests\n`tests/test_research_targeting_os.py` — **23 passed, 1 skipped** (the skip runs from repo root). `tests/test_doctrine_guardrails.py` still passes. ruff + black (py311) clean on the new files.\n\n> Discovery provider can be swapped (Vertex AI Search / SerpAPI / Tavily / Brave) without changing the engine or the policy.\n\nhttps://claude.ai/code/session_01EMmqgsT4T39K1GqAB6uH3e\n\n---\n_Generated by [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code/session_01EMmqgsT4T39K1GqAB6uH3e)_",

This is the SINGLE queue for company-level outreach/proposal\n+    drafts awaiting sign-off.\n+\n+    Read-only. Backed by the durable draft queue\n+    (`auto_client_acquisition.commercial_orchestrator.draft_queue`, a JSON-Lines\n+    file at $DEALIX_DRAFT_QUEUE_PATH, default `var/draft-queue.jsonl`,\n+    gitignored). .\reports\github-context\pr-670\review_comments.json:7:    "diff_hunk": "@@ -140,6 +140,136 @@\n     }\n \n \n+@router.post(\"/custom-ai-request\")\n+async def custom_ai_request(req: Request) -> dict[str, Any]:\n+    \"\"\"Public Custom AI Service intake (commercial ladder Rung 4).\n+\n+    Captures a bespoke AI project request from the landing page and stores it\n+    as a governed lead for founder review. No external action is taken without\n+    approval — this only records the inquiry and returns a confirmation.\n+\n+    Body: {name, company, email, phone, sector?, use_case?, data_readiness?,\n+           budget_band?, timeline?, description?, consent, website(honeypot)}\n+    Returns: {ok, lead_id?, governance_decision: \"allow\"}\n+    \"\"\"\n+    try:\n+        body = await req.json()\n+    except Exception as e:\n+        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail=\"invalid_json\") from e\n+\n+    # Honeypot: if \"website\" field is filled, silently drop\n+    if body.get(\"website\"):\n+        log.info(\"custom_ai_request_honeypot_triggered\")\n+        return {\"ok\": True, \"governance_decision\": \"allow\"}\n+\n+    name = str(body.get(\"name\") or \"\").strip()\n+    company = str(body.get(\"company\") or \"\").strip()\n+    email = str(body.get(\"email\") or \"\").strip()\n+    phone = str(body.get(\"phone\") or \"\").strip()\n+    sector = str(body.get(\"sector\") or \"\").strip()\n+    use_case = str(body.get(\"use_case\") or \"\").strip()\n+    data_readiness = str(body.get(\"data_readiness\") or \"\").strip()\n+    budget_band = str(body.get(\"budget_band\") or \"\").strip()\n+    timeline = str(body.get(\"timeline\") or \"\").strip()\n+    description = str(body.get(\"description\") or \"\").strip()\n+    consent = bool(body.get(\"consent\"))\n+\n+    if not name or not company or \"@\" not in email or not phone:\n+        raise HTTPException(status_code=422, detail=\"missing_required_fields\")\n+    if not consent:\n+        raise HTTPException(status_code=422, detail=\"consent_required\")\n+\n+    # Fire PostHog event (fire-and-forget — never blocks response)\n+    try:\n+        await capture_event(\n+            \"custom_ai_requested\",\n+            distinct_id=email,\n+            properties={\n+                \"company\": company,\n+                \"sector\": sector,\n+                \"use_case\": use_case[:120],\n+                \"budget_band\": budget_band,\n+                \"timeline\": timeline,\n+                \"data_readiness\": data_readiness,\n+                \"description_len\": len(description),\n+                \"source\": \"landing.custom_ai_form\",\n+            },\n+        )\n+    except Exception:\n+        log.exception(\"posthog_capture_failed\")\n+\n+    # Persist to local lead-inbox (gitignored var/lead-inbox.jsonl) so the\n+    # founder reviews every custom-AI inquiry in /api/v1/founder/leads.\n+    # Best-effort: failure never 5xx the public form.\n+    lead_id: str | None = None\n+    try:\n+        from auto_client_acquisition import lead_inbox\n+        rec = lead_inbox.append({\n+            \"name\": name,\n+            \"company\": company,\n+            \"email\": email,\n+            \"phone\": phone,\n+            \"sector\": sector,\n+            \"message\": description,\n+            \"consent\": consent,\n+            \"source\": str(body.get(\"source\") or \"landing.custom_ai_form\"),\n+            \"ref\": str(body.get(\"ref\") or \"\"),\n+            \"offer_interest\": \"custom_ai\",\n+            \"custom_ai\": {\n+                \"use_case\": use_case,\n+                \"data_readiness\": data_readiness,\n+                \"budget_band\": budget_band,\n+                \"timeline\": timeline,\n+            },\n+        })\n+        lead_id = rec.get(\"id\")\n+    except Exception:\n+        log.exception(\"lead_inbox_append_failed\")\n+\n+    log.info(\n+        \"custom_ai_request_accepted email=%s company=%s sector=%s budget=%s lead_id=%s\",\n+        _safe_log(email),\n+        _safe_log(company),\n+        _safe_log(sector),",

.\docs\23_standards\AGENT_CONTROL_STANDARD.md:7:An AI agent is any software entity that (a) reads inputs, (b) invokes a model, and (c) can take an action with effects outside its own process. An agent that can only suggest text to a human is still an agent under this standard; it must have an identity, a card, and a controlling owner. An agent that can send a message, write to a CRM, or call an external API is more strongly constrained.
.\docs\23_standards\AGENT_CONTROL_STANDARD.md:59:| `L2` | **Review-required** | The agent prepares actions but cannot execute them without explicit human approval per action. |
.\docs\23_standards\AGENT_CONTROL_STANDARD.md:64:Promotion between levels requires: a written justification, a re-issued Agent Card, an updated Proof Pack precedent, and the kill-switch owner's signed approval.
.\docs\23_standards\AGENT_CONTROL_STANDARD.md:74:The following tools are denied for any agent in MVP, regardless of autonomy level, Card configuration, or owner approval. Attempting to invoke them produces `BLOCK` and a recorded incident.

All drafts have `review_status = pending_review`.\n- `tests/test_no_auto_send.py` scans repo for forbidden patterns.\n- `scripts/check_no_secrets.py` runs before every daily operator.\n- PDPL-aligned data retention policy documented.\n\n## How to test\n```bash\npython3 scripts/check_no_secrets.py\npython3 scripts/verify_dealix_ultimate_os.py\npython3 scripts/dealix_daily_operator.py --mode demo\npython3 scripts/production_readiness_check.py\ncd apps/web && npm run typecheck && npm run build\npytest tests/v3/ -q --confcutdir=tests/v3\n```\n\n## Daily operator command\n```bash\npython3 scripts/dealix_daily_operator.py --mode demo\n```\n\n## Deployment notes\n- Frontend: Vercel (`apps/web`)\n- Backend: Railway (`api/`)\n- See `docs/deploy/` for detailed guides.\n\n## Known limitations\n- Outreach drafts are template-based; deeper personalization requires CRM integration.\n- Founder dashboard uses demo data until production CRM sync is configured.\n- Some datetime deprecation warnings exist (non-breaking).\n\n## Checklist\n- [x] No auto-send outreach\n- [x] Human review required\n- [x] No secrets committed\n- [x] Demo mode works\n- [x] Web build passes\n- [x] Master verification passes\n- [x] Production readiness check passes\n- [x] Branch pushed to GitHub\n",

.\reports\github-context\pr-747\detail.json:7:  "body": "Bumps [minimatch](https://github.com/isaacs/minimatch) to 10.2.5 and updates ancestor dependencies [minimatch](https://github.com/isaacs/minimatch), [eslint](https://github.com/eslint/eslint) and [typescript-eslint](https://github.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint/tree/HEAD/packages/typescript-eslint). These dependencies need to be updated together.\n\nUpdates `minimatch` from 9.0.5 to 10.2.5\n<details>\n<summary>Changelog</summary>\n<p><em>Sourced from <a href=\"https://github.com/isaacs/minimatch/blob/main/changelog.md\">minimatch's changelog</a>.</em></p>\n<blockquote>\n<h1>change log</h1>\n<h2>10.2</h2>\n<ul>\n<li>Add <code>braceExpandMax</code> option</li>\n</ul>\n<h2>10.1</h2>\n<ul>\n<li>Add <code>magicalBraces</code> option for <code>escape</code></li>\n<li>Fix <code>makeRe</code> when <code>partial: true</code> is set.</li>\n<li>Fix <code>makeRe</code> when pattern ends in a final <code>**</code> path part.</li>\n</ul>\n<h2>10.0</h2>\n<ul>\n<li>Require node 20 or 22 and higher</li>\n</ul>\n<h2>9.0</h2>\n<ul>\n<li>No default export, only named exports.</li>\n</ul>\n<h2>8.0</h2>\n<ul>\n<li>Recursive descent parser for extglob, allowing correct support\nfor arbitrarily nested extglob expressions</li>\n<li>Bump required Node.js version</li>\n</ul>\n<h2>7.4</h2>\n<ul>\n<li>Add <code>escape()</code> method</li>\n<li>Add <code>unescape()</code> method</li>\n<li>Add <code>Minimatch.hasMagic()</code> method</li>\n</ul>\n<h2>7.3</h2>\n<ul>\n<li>Add support for posix character classes in a unicode-aware way.</li>\n</ul>\n<h2>7.2</h2>\n<ul>\n<li>Add <code>windowsNoMagicRoot</code> option</li>\n</ul>\n<h2>7.1</h2>\n<ul>\n<li>Add <code>optimizationLevel</code> configuration option, and revert the\ndefault back to the 6.2 style minimal optimizations, making the\nadvanced transforms introduced in 7.0 opt-in. Also, process\nprovided file paths in the same way in optimizationLevel:2\nmode, so <em>most</em> things that matched with optimizationLevel 1 or\n0 <em>should</em> match with level 2 as well. However, level 1 is the\ndefault, out of an abundance of caution.</li>\n</ul>\n<!-- raw HTML omitted -->\n</blockquote>\n<p>... .\reports\github-context\pr-671\review_comments.json:7:    "diff_hunk": "@@ -0,0 +1,172 @@\n+\"\"\"Append-only decision ledger for the Dealix Now engine.\n+\n+Every founder decision on a draft (approve / reject / any note) is recorded as\n+one JSONL line. ``approve`` / ``reject`` ONLY log and return a result dict —\n+they never send anything. ``approve`` returns founder-operated ``mailto`` and\n+``whatsapp`` deep links (URL-encoded from the draft subject/body) so the\n+founder can send manually. Dealix never auto-sends (doctrine rule 5 + agent\n+interaction rule 1).\n+\n+JSONL store with env override, mirroring ``value_os/value_ledger.py`` and\n+``payment_ops/renewal_scheduler.py``: path from ``DEALIX_NOW_LEDGER_PATH``,\n+default ``var/now_ledger.jsonl`` (``var/`` is gitignored).\n+\n+Pure I/O + string building: no network, no API keys, no LLM.\n+\"\"\"\n+\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+import json\n+import logging\n+import os\n+from datetime import UTC, datetime\n+from pathlib import Path\n+from urllib.parse import quote\n+\n+log = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n+\n+_DEFAULT_PATH = \"var/now_ledger.jsonl\"\n+\n+APPROVED_STATUS = \"approved — ready to send by founder (Dealix never auto-sends)\"\n+REJECTED_STATUS = \"rejected — archived, nothing sent\"\n+\n+VALID_DECISIONS = frozenset({\"approved\", \"rejected\", \"noted\"})\n+\n+\n+def _ledger_path() -> Path:\n+    raw = os.getenv(\"DEALIX_NOW_LEDGER_PATH\", _DEFAULT_PATH)\n+    path = Path(raw)\n+    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n+    return path\n+\n+\n+def _now_iso() -> str:\n+    return datetime.now(UTC).isoformat()\n+\n+\n+def _find_latest(draft_id: str) -> dict | None:\n+    \"\"\"Return the most recent ledger record for ``draft_id``, or ``None``.\"\"\"\n+    latest: dict | None = None\n+    for rec in list_decisions():\n+        if rec.get(\"draft_id\") == draft_id:\n+            latest = rec\n+    return latest\n+\n+\n+def record_decision(\n+    draft_id: str,\n+    decision: str,\n+    actor: str = \"founder\",\n+    note: str = \"\",\n+) -> dict:\n+    \"\"\"Append one decision record and return it.\n+\n+    ``decision`` is normalized; unknown values are stored as ``noted`` so the\n+    log never silently drops an action.\n+    \"\"\"\n+    normalized = decision.strip().lower()\n+    if normalized not in VALID_DECISIONS:\n+        normalized = \"noted\"\n+    record = {\n+        \"draft_id\": str(draft_id),\n+        \"decision\": normalized,\n+        \"actor\": str(actor or \"founder\"),\n+        \"note\": str(note or \"\"),\n+        \"logged_at\": _now_iso(),\n+    }\n+    path = _ledger_path()\n+    with path.open(\"a\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as handle:\n+        handle.write(json.dumps(record, ensure_ascii=False))\n+        handle.write(\"\\n\")\n+    log.info(\"now_decision_recorded draft_id=%s decision=%s actor=%s\", draft_id, normalized, actor)",

     combined.extend(interleaved)\n+    combined = combined[:target_rows_needed]\n+\n+    drafts: list[dict[str, Any]] = []\n+    idx = 1\n+    for company in combined:\n+        for language in {\n+                \"id\": d[\"id\"],\n+                \"company\": d[\"company\"],\n+                \"sector\": d[\"sector\"],\n+                \"language\": d[\"language\"],\n+ .\reports\github-context\pr-701\review_comments.json:7:    "diff_hunk": "@@ -0,0 +1,272 @@\n+\"\"\"Transformation OS Proposal Generator — bilingual (AR+EN), governed, stateless.\n+\n+Builds an enterprise transformation proposal from the canonical service catalog\n+(`auto_client_acquisition.service_catalog`). It NEVER hardcodes prices (Article 11\n++ no_invented_crm_kpi) — every figure is read from the registry and stamped as an\n+estimate (Article 8). Output defaults to `approval_status=\"approval_required\"` and\n+is never auto-sent (NO_LIVE_SEND). Guaranteed-outcome language in the request is\n+rejected (doctrine: no_guaranteed_sales_claims).\n+\n+Input:  TransformationProposalRequest (company, sector, selected_system_ids, …)\n+Output: TransformationProposal (line items from catalog + bilingual markdown)\n+Gate:   approval_required — founder reviews before anything reaches a customer.\n+\"\"\"\n+\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+import hashlib\n+import json\n+import logging\n+from datetime import UTC, datetime\n+from typing import Any\n+\n+from pydantic import BaseModel, ConfigDict, Field\n+\n+from auto_client_acquisition.service_catalog import get_offering\n+\n+log = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n+\n+# Tokens that would turn a proposal into a forbidden guarantee (doctrine).\n+_FORBIDDEN_AR = (\"نضمن\", \"ضمان مؤكد\", \"مضمون\")\n+_FORBIDDEN_EN = (\"guarantee\", \"guaranteed\")\n+\n+_DISCLAIMER_AR = \"القيمة التقديرية ليست قيمة مُتحقَّقة — Estimated value is not Verified value.\"\n+_APPROVAL_NOTE_AR = \"هذا العرض للمراجعة فقط — لن يُرسَل لأي عميل دون موافقة المؤسس.\"\n+_APPROVAL_NOTE_EN = \"This proposal is for review only — will not be sent without founder approval.\"\n+\n+\n+class TransformationProposalError(ValueError):\n+    \"\"\"Raised on doctrine violation or empty/invalid selection. Routers map → 400.\"\"\"\n+\n+\n+class TransformationProposalRequest(BaseModel):\n+    model_config = ConfigDict(extra=\"forbid\")\n+\n+    company_name: str = Field(..., min_length=1)\n+    sector: str = \"b2b_services\"\n+    selected_system_ids: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)\n+    stakeholders: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)  # e.g. CEO, CFO, CTO, COO\n+    pain_points: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)\n+    notes: str = \"\"\n+\n+\n+class ProposalLineItem(BaseModel):\n+    system_id: str\n+    name_ar: str\n+    name_en: str\n+    price_unit: str\n+    setup_sar_min: float\n+    setup_sar_max: float | None = None\n+    monthly_sar_min: float | None = None\n+    monthly_sar_max: float | None = None\n+    deliverables: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)\n+    is_estimate: bool = True\n+\n+\n+class TransformationProposal(BaseModel):\n+    proposal_id: str\n+    company_name: str\n+    sector: str\n+    generated_at: datetime = Field(default_factory=lambda: datetime.now(UTC))\n+    stakeholders: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)\n+    line_items: list[ProposalLineItem]\n+    unknown_system_ids: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)\n+    total_setup_sar_min: float = 0.0\n+    total_setup_sar_max: float = 0.0\n+    total_monthly_sar_min: float = 0.0\n+    total_monthly_sar_max: float = 0.0\n+    markdown_ar_en: str = \"\"\n+    is_estimate: bool = True\n+    approval_status: str = \"approval_required\"\n+    governance_decision: str = \"pending\"  # pending | approved | rejected\n+\n+    def to_dict(self) -> dict[str, Any]:\n+        return json.loads(self.model_dump_json())\n+\n+\n+class TransformationProposalGenerator:\n+    \"\"\"Assembles a bilingual transformation proposal from catalog offerings.\"\"\"\n+\n+    def generate(self, req: TransformationProposalRequest) -> TransformationProposal:\n+        self._guard_no_guarantee(req)\n+\n+        if not req.selected_system_ids:\n+            raise TransformationProposalError(\n+                \"selected_system_ids is empty — اختر نظامًا واحدًا على الأقل من الكتالوج.\"\n+            )\n+\n+        line_items: list[ProposalLineItem] = []\n+        unknown: list[str] = []\n+        for sid in req.selected_system_ids:\n+            offering = get_offering(sid)\n+            # Only enterprise transformation systems are valid here.\n+            if offering is None or offering.customer_journey_stage != \"transformation\":\n+                unknown.append(sid)\n+                continue\n+            line_items.append(\n+                ProposalLineItem(\n+                    system_id=offering.id,\n+                    name_ar=offering.name_ar,\n+                    name_en=offering.name_en,\n+                    price_unit=offering.price_unit,\n+                    setup_sar_min=offering.price_sar,\n+                    setup_sar_max=offering.price_sar_max,\n+                    monthly_sar_min=offering.price_monthly_sar_min,\n+                    monthly_sar_max=offering.price_monthly_sar_max,\n+                    deliverables=list(offering.deliverables),\n+                )\n+            )\n+\n+        if not line_items:\n+            raise TransformationProposalError(\n+                \"No valid transformation systems selected — \"\n+                f\"unknown ids: {', '.join(unknown) or '(none)'}\"\n+            )\n+\n+        totals = self._totals(line_items)\n+        proposal_id = self._proposal_id(req)\n+        proposal = TransformationProposal(\n+            proposal_id=proposal_id,\n+            company_name=req.company_name,\n+            sector=req.sector,\n+            stakeholders=list(req.stakeholders),\n+            line_items=line_items,\n+            unknown_system_ids=unknown,\n+            **totals,\n+        )\n+        proposal.markdown_ar_en = self._render_markdown(req, proposal)\n+        log.info(\n+            \"transformation_proposal_generated proposal_id=%s company=%s systems=%d\",\n+            proposal_id,\n+            req.company_name,",

TransformationProposalRequest) -> str:\n+        seed = f\"{req.company_name}{req.sector}{datetime.now(UTC).isoformat()}\"\n+        return \"txp_\" + hashlib.sha256(seed.encode()).hexdigest()[:16]\n+\n+    @staticmethod\n+    def _totals(items: list[ProposalLineItem]) -> dict[str, float]:\n+        setup_min = sum(i.setup_sar_min for i in items)\n+        # For the ceiling, fall back to the floor when a system has no max (custom).\n+        setup_max = sum(\n+            (i.setup_sar_max if i.setup_sar_max is not None else i.setup_sar_min) for i in items\n+        )\n+        monthly_min = sum((i.monthly_sar_min or 0.0) for i in items)\n+        monthly_max = sum(\n+            (i.monthly_sar_max if i.monthly_sar_max is not None else (i.monthly_sar_min or 0.0))\n+            for i in items\n+        )\n+        return {\n+            \"total_setup_sar_min\": float(setup_min),\n+            \"total_setup_sar_max\": float(setup_max),\n+            \"total_monthly_sar_min\": float(monthly_min),\n+            \"total_monthly_sar_max\": float(monthly_max),\n+        }\n+\n+    @staticmethod\n+    def _fmt_range(low: float | None, high: float | None) -> str:\n+        if not low and not high:\n+            return \"Custom / مخصص\"\n+        lo = f\"{int(low):,}\" if low else \"0\"\n+        if high is None or high == low:\n+            return f\"{lo} SAR\"\n+        return f\"{lo}–{int(high):,} SAR\"\n+\n+    def _render_markdown(\n+        self, req: TransformationProposalRequest, p: TransformationProposal\n+    ) -> str:\n+        now = p.generated_at.strftime(\"%Y-%m-%d\")\n+        lines: list[str] = [\n+            f\"# عرض التحول — {req.company_name}\",\n+            f\"**Dealix Transformation Proposal Status: **approval_required**\",\n+            \"\",\n+            f\"القطاع / Sector: {req.sector}\",\n+        ]\n+        if req.stakeholders:\n+            lines.append(f\"أصحاب القرار / Stakeholders: {', '.join(req.stakeholders)}\")\n+        lines += [\n+            \"\",\n+            \"## ملخص تنفيذي / Executive Summary\",\n+            \"\",\n+            \"نصمّم نظام تشغيل أعمال .\reports\github-context\pr-701\detail.json:9:  "body": "## ما الذي يفعله هذا الـ PR / What this does\n\nيرفع Dealix إلى **شركة أنظمة تحوّل (Transformation Systems)** — لكن **بالطريقة المحكومة**: دمج في الكتالوج الموحّد والمعمارية ذات الطبقات الخمس، بدل سايلو منفصل يكسر CI والدكترين.\n\nElevates Dealix into a Transformation Systems company **the governed way** — integrated into the canonical catalog and 5-plane architecture, not a parallel silo.\n\n### لماذا ليس سكربت الـ silo / Why not the original script\nThe originally-proposed `transformation_os/` tree (duplicate YAML catalog + standalone proposal generator + flat price list) would have **broken CI** (the `exactly-7` catalog test + `count==7` JSON test), **duplicated the single source of truth** (`registry.py`, Article 11), and **bypassed the 10 doctrine non-negotiables**. This PR delivers the same vision through the existing governed surfaces instead.\n\n## التغييرات / Changes\n\n**Catalog (single source of truth):**\n- `ServiceOffering` gains optional setup/monthly range fields + a `\"transformation\"` journey stage (the 7 core offerings are unchanged).\n- 10 Enterprise Transformation OS offerings added → registry **7 → 17**: AI Command Center, WhatsApp Revenue, Brand Intelligence, AI Agent Workforce, Client Experience, Operations Automation, Executive Reporting, Trust & Governance, Growth Engine, Custom Enterprise System. Prices are **estimate ranges** (`is_estimate=True`).\n- All 10 wired into `commercial_map` (`_WIRING`/`_OFFER_NOTES`), founder-issued checkout.\n- Regenerated `landing/assets/data/services-catalog.json` (count 17).\n\n**Doctrine-safe by construction:**\n- No `live_send`/`live_charge`; every offering's `hard_gates` include `no_cold_whatsapp`, `no_scraping`, `no_fake_proof`.\n- **Growth Engine OS** is draft-only/approval-gated (no cold outreach, no LinkedIn automation, no blast, no scraping) — verified by a dedicated test.\n- No `\"guaranteed\"/\"نضمن\"` anywhere (token-scanned).\n\n**Governed, stateless generators** (read prices from the catalog, approval-gated, estimate-stamped, bilingual AR+EN):\n- `dealix/commercial/transformation_proposal.py`\n- `dealix/commercial/roi_calculator.py`\n- `api/routers/commercial.py`: `POST /api/v1/commercial/transformation-proposal/generate(/markdown)`, `POST /api/v1/commercial/roi/estimate`.\n\n**Tests:** count `7→17` in `test_service_catalog` + `test_wave15_customer_journey_e2e`; ladder test scoped to the core funnel; new catalog/proposal/router/ROI tests.\n\n**Docs:** Transformation OS master positioning (AR+EN), 4-front roadmap, and `enterprise_package/` MSA · DPA · ROI worksheet · multi-stakeholder playbook. `no_overclaim` register updated.\n\n## ملاحظات / Notes\n- **Service Readiness Matrix intentionally untouched** — it's a decoupled 32-row taxonomy count-locked by its own tests; expanding it is a documented roadmap item.\n- **Roadmap (future PRs):** security hardening (existing `scorecard.yml` remediation), enterprise trust pack, proposal/ROI persistence, brand/identity OS.\n\n## التحقق / Verification\n- 138 relevant tests pass (catalog, transformation, proposal, ROI, router, doctrine guards, commercial chain, wave15, commercial-map).\n- `compileall` across all CI packages: OK. RESEARCH -> OUTREACH -> DISCOVERY -> PROPOSAL -> NEGOTIATION -> WON -> LOST\n+\n+The stage list aligns with the ``sales_pipeline_item.schema.json`` enum\n+(simplified to 7 stages for the operational tracker; the full schema is used\n+for data export).\n+\"\"\"\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+import json\n+import os\n+import threading\n+import uuid\n+from dataclasses import asdict, dataclass, field\n+from datetime import UTC, datetime\n+from pathlib import Path\n+from typing import Any\n+\n+\n+class PipelineStage:\n+    \"\"\"Stage constants for the pipeline tracker.\n+\n+    Examples:\n+        >>> PipelineStage.RESEARCH\n+        'RESEARCH'\n+        >>> PipelineStage.WON\n+        'WON'\n+        >>> \"RESEARCH\" in PipelineStage.ALL\n+        True\n+    \"\"\"\n+\n+    RESEARCH = \"RESEARCH\"\n+    OUTREACH = \"OUTREACH\"\n+    DISCOVERY = \"DISCOVERY\"\n+    PROPOSAL = \"PROPOSAL\"\n+    NEGOTIATION = \"NEGOTIATION\"\n+    WON = \"WON\"\n+    LOST = \"LOST\"\n+\n+    ALL: list[str] = [\n+        RESEARCH,\n+        OUTREACH,\n+        DISCOVERY,\n+        PROPOSAL,\n+        NEGOTIATION,\n+        WON,\n+        LOST,\n+    ]\n+\n+\n+_STAGE_SET: frozenset[str] = frozenset(PipelineStage.ALL)\n+\n+\n+@dataclass\n+class PipelineItem:\n+    \"\"\"A single deal in the sales pipeline.\n+\n+    Attributes:\n+        id:              UUID-based deal identifier (auto-generated).\n+        account_name:    Human-readable company name.\n+        stage:           Current pipeline stage from :class:`PipelineStage`.\n+        offer_id:        Canonical offer identifier.\n+        value_sar:       Estimated deal value in SAR (0 = unknown).\n+        icp_score:       ICP total score at time of entry.\n+        last_touch_date: ISO date of last outreach/contact.\n+        next_action:     Free-text description of the next step.\n+        owner_notes:     Internal notes (not sent to client).\n+\n+    Examples:\n+        >>> item = PipelineItem(\n+        ...     id=\"deal_001\",\n+        ...     account_name=\"Acme Motors\",\n+        ...     stage=\"RESEARCH\",\n+        ...     offer_id=\"REVENUE_LEAK_AUDIT\",\n+        ... .\docs\gtm\outreach\SENDING_RAMP_OS_AR.md:11:`auto_client_acquisition/gtm_os/sending_ramp.py` is a **planner only**: `plan_sending_batches()` returns `batches` and never sends. **250 drafts/day is a fine production target; 250 sends/day from a cold domain is a reputation risk.** The curve decides how many **approved** drafts may be sent today, given the domain's age and health. Every external send requires founder approval via `auto_client_acquisition/approval_center/` and a present unsubscribe link. Drafts arrive from the factory in [COLD_EMAIL_DRAFT_FACTORY_AR.md](COLD_EMAIL_DRAFT_FACTORY_AR.md). No scraping, no purchased lists.

.\docs\gtm\outreach\SENDING_RAMP_OS_AR.md:77:**سقف التكرار لكل مستلم:** تُمرَّر مجموعة `recently_contacted_refs` إلى المخطِّط؛ أي مستلم فيها يُستبعَد بـ `frequency_cap` — لا نطرق الباب نفسه مرتين في نافذة قصيرة. **الكبح فوري وقطعي:** تُمرَّر `suppression_refs`، وأي مستلم في قائمة الكبح يُستبعَد بـ `suppression_hit`. أسباب الكبح (`SUPPRESSION_REASONS`): `unsubscribe`, `complaint`, `bounce`, `angry`, `manual`، وهي `permanent = true` افتراضيًا. منطق توليد الكبح من الردود في [REPLY_HANDLING_OS_AR.md](REPLY_HANDLING_OS_AR.md).
.\docs\gtm\outreach\SENDING_RAMP_OS_AR.md:81:**Per-recipient frequency cap:** pass `recently_contacted_refs` to the planner; any recipient in it is excluded as `frequency_cap` — we do not knock the same door twice in a short window. **Suppression is immediate and absolute:** pass `suppression_refs`, and any recipient on the suppression list is excluded as `suppression_hit`. Suppression reasons (`SUPPRESSION_REASONS`): `unsubscribe`, `complaint`, `bounce`, `angry`, `manual`, all `permanent = true` by default. .\docs\gtm\outreach\SENDING_RAMP_OS_AR.md:89:The plan does not send. Any LinkedIn lookup is **manual LinkedIn company search (founder-approved per call)** only. The operational deliverability check lives in `auto_client_acquisition/email/deliverability_check.py`.

.\docs\gtm\outreach\REPLY_HANDLING_OS_AR.md:11:Every inbound reply to an **approved** send is classified, then routed to an action. Every `Reply` record is PII-free (via `prospect_ref` and `draft_ref`) and is born with `governance_decision = "approval_required"`: routing is a suggestion for the founder, not an automatic act. .\docs\gtm\outreach\REPLY_HANDLING_OS_AR.md:53:ثلاثة أصناف ترفع `requires_suppression = true`: `unsubscribe`, `angry`, `bounce`. كل منها يُنشئ `SuppressionEntry` فورًا و`permanent = true`، فلا يُتواصَل مع المستلم مجددًا. الكبح يسري في موضعين: البوابة تحجب أي مسودة لمستلم مكبوح بـ `suppression_hit`، والمخطِّط يستبعده بنفس الكود (انظر [SENDING_RAMP_OS_AR.md](SENDING_RAMP_OS_AR.md) و[DELIVERABILITY_AND_COMPLIANCE_AR.md](DELIVERABILITY_AND_COMPLIANCE_AR.md)). أسباب الكبح في `records.SUPPRESSION_REASONS`.
.\docs\gtm\outreach\REPLY_HANDLING_OS_AR.md:57:Three classes raise `requires_suppression = true`: `unsubscribe`, `angry`, `bounce`. Each creates a `SuppressionEntry` immediately, with `permanent = true`, so the recipient is never contacted again. Suppression applies in two places: the gate blocks any draft for a suppressed recipient as `suppression_hit`, and the planner excludes them on the same code (see [SENDING_RAMP_OS_AR.md](SENDING_RAMP_OS_AR.md) and [DELIVERABILITY_AND_COMPLIANCE_AR.md](DELIVERABILITY_AND_COMPLIANCE_AR.md)). Suppression reasons live in `records.SUPPRESSION_REASONS`.
.\docs\gtm\outreach\REPLY_HANDLING_OS_AR.md:61:- **`positive` → اكتشاف:** الانتقال إلى مكالمة/واتساب يتطلّب موافقة المؤسس **وموافقة المستلم (consent)**؛ لا قناة خارجية بلا opt-in. سجّل الموافقة في `auto_client_acquisition/compliance_os/consent_ledger`.
.\docs\gtm\outreach\REPLY_HANDLING_OS_AR.md:68:- **`positive` → discovery:** moving to a call/WhatsApp requires founder approval **and recipient consent**; no external channel without opt-in. Record consent in `auto_client_acquisition/compliance_os/consent_ledger`.

.\docs\gtm\outreach\DELIVERABILITY_AND_COMPLIANCE_AR.md:29:| **SPF** | Declares who may send for the domain (`v=spf1 … -all`) |
.\docs\gtm\outreach\DELIVERABILITY_AND_COMPLIANCE_AR.md:39:Start on personal Gmail at low limits, then move sending to a **separate domain you control** after the first paid pilots (see the two phases in [../../ops/EMAIL_DELIVERABILITY.md](../../ops/EMAIL_DELIVERABILITY.md)). .\docs\gtm\outreach\DELIVERABILITY_AND_COMPLIANCE_AR.md:43:قواعد مرسِلي Google السائبة (تنطبق عند الحجوم الأعلى إلى صناديق المستهلكين): **List-Unsubscribe بنقرة واحدة (RFC 8058)** في كل إرسال، **معدل شكاوى سبام < 0.3%** (استهدف < 0.1%)، ومصادقة دومين قائمة (SPF/DKIM/DMARC). الدالة `auto_client_acquisition/email/deliverability_check.py` تفحص الجاهزية التشغيلية. أي حالة `unhealthy/bounce_spike/spam_warning` تحجب كل الإرسال في المخطِّط.
.\docs\gtm\outreach\DELIVERABILITY_AND_COMPLIANCE_AR.md:47:Google's bulk sender rules (apply at higher volumes to consumer inboxes): **one-click List-Unsubscribe (RFC 8058)** on every send, **spam-complaint rate < 0.3%** (target < 0.1%), and standing domain authentication (SPF/DKIM/DMARC). `auto_client_acquisition/email/deliverability_check.py` checks operational readiness. Any `unhealthy/bounce_spike/spam_warning` state blocks all sending in the planner.
.\docs\gtm\outreach\DELIVERABILITY_AND_COMPLIANCE_AR.md:67:| **Clear opt-out, honored promptly** | `missing_unsubscribe` blocks any draft without an opt-out; unsubscribe → immediate suppression |
.\docs\gtm\outreach\DELIVERABILITY_AND_COMPLIANCE_AR.md:73:قائمة الكبح قطعية. أسباب الكبح (`records.SUPPRESSION_REASONS`): `unsubscribe`, `complaint`, `bounce`, `angry`, `manual`. أي ارتداد (bounce) أو شكوى أو طلب إلغاء أو رد غاضب → `SuppressionEntry` فورًا و`permanent = true`. المخطِّط في [SENDING_RAMP_OS_AR.md](SENDING_RAMP_OS_AR.md) يستبعد أي `recipient_ref` مكبوح بـ `suppression_hit`، والبوابة تحجب المسودة بنفس الكود. منطق تصنيف الردود وتوليد الكبح في [REPLY_HANDLING_OS_AR.md](REPLY_HANDLING_OS_AR.md) و`auto_client_acquisition/email/reply_classifier.py`.
.\docs\gtm\outreach\DELIVERABILITY_AND_COMPLIANCE_AR.md:77:The suppression list is absolute. Suppression reasons (`records.SUPPRESSION_REASONS`): `unsubscribe`, `complaint`, `bounce`, `angry`, `manual`. Any bounce, complaint, unsubscribe, or angry reply → a `SuppressionEntry` immediately, with `permanent = true`. The planner in [SENDING_RAMP_OS_AR.md](SENDING_RAMP_OS_AR.md) excludes any suppressed `recipient_ref` as `suppression_hit`, and the gate blocks the draft on the same code. Reply classification and suppression generation live in [REPLY_HANDLING_OS_AR.md](REPLY_HANDLING_OS_AR.md) and `auto_client_acquisition/email/reply_classifier.py`.
.\docs\gtm\outreach\COLD_EMAIL_DRAFT_FACTORY_AR.md:15:The factory produces **drafts only**. Every `OutreachDraft` is born with `governance_decision = "approval_required"` and `send_status = "draft"`, and leaves only through the founder approval queue in `auto_client_acquisition/approval_center/`. No scraping, no cold WhatsApp, no LinkedIn automation, no purchased lists — non-negotiable. Any LinkedIn lookup is **manual LinkedIn company search (founder-approved per call)** only.

.\docs\gtm\FOUNDER_APPROVAL_QUEUE_AR.md:1:# Founder Approval Queue — طابور موافقة المؤسس — How approval-ready drafts reach the founder
.\docs\gtm\FOUNDER_APPROVAL_QUEUE_AR.md:13:Every draft in this layer is born `governance_decision = "approval_required"`. Passing the quality gate is not a send — it only means the draft is **ready for a human**. The final decision (send, pricing, commitment, payment handoff) belongs to the **founder alone**, consistent with [`os/06_APPROVAL_GATES.yml`](../../os/06_APPROVAL_GATES.yml): any action that affects the outside world, real data, or commercial commitments halts automatically until explicit approval.
.\docs\gtm\FOUNDER_APPROVAL_QUEUE_AR.md:27:The daily batch is aggregated by `summarize_gate_results()`, which yields `approval_ready_ids`, `blocked_ids`, and `top_failure_reasons`. These feed the daily command in [`scripts/gtm_daily_command.py`](../../scripts/gtm_daily_command.py) → the "Top approval queue" section (up to 50 drafts).
.\docs\gtm\FOUNDER_APPROVAL_QUEUE_AR.md:61:For each queue item the founder picks one decision; nothing is auto-decided. Decisions flow through the approval center (`approval_policy`, `founder_rules`, `approval_store`) in [`approval_center/`](../../auto_client_acquisition/approval_center/). Each is logged with a timestamp and reference for a full audit trail. Decisions that return a draft to the factory (Rewrite / Shorten / Make formal / Change offer) re-run the quality gate before re-queueing. `Do not contact` is terminal.
.\docs\gtm\FOUNDER_APPROVAL_QUEUE_AR.md:71:This layer's queue does not replace the institutional approval gates; it sits on top of them. The gate registry in [`os/06_APPROVAL_GATES.yml`](../../os/06_APPROVAL_GATES.yml) forces human approval on high-risk decisions — including the first email to a company (`G01`), follow-ups (`G02`), sharing a price (`G03`), sending a proposal (`G04`), and running any externally-facing automation (`G09`). Approving a draft here means satisfying the relevant gate, never bypassing it. Override authority is founder-only.
.\docs\gtm\FOUNDER_APPROVAL_QUEUE_AR.md:75:## 5) ما بعد الاعتماد — After approval (AR)
.\docs\gtm\FOUNDER_APPROVAL_QUEUE_AR.md:93:This layer links the approval center; it does not duplicate its rules.
